_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-28 13:51:01Z)**_

多邻国 iPad 版 UI 风格：

- **色调**：白色/浅灰底，绿色（#58CC02）为主色调，高饱和度
- **圆角**：大圆角卡片和按钮，整体圆润可爱
- **字体**：粗圆体，标题醒目，层次清晰
- **吉祥物**：Duo（绿色猫头鹰）频繁出现，强调情感反馈
- **进度系统**：条形进度条 + 火焰连续天数 + 宝石/心形图标，游戏化浓厚
- **课程地图**：垂直滚动路线图，像游戏关卡地图，节点式布局
- **反馈动画**：答对有爆炸粒子/角色跳动，答错有红色抖动提示
- **间距**：宽松，留白充足，适合触屏操作
- **整体调性**：轻松、卡通、游戏化，目标用户感知是"玩"而非"学"

---

_**User (2026-03-28 13:55:48Z)**_

多邻国语言风格核心是“游戏化+人格化+情绪反馈”。整体语气轻松口语化，避免传统教学的严肃表达，通过短句（如“很好！”“再试一次！”）降低学习压力。系统用游戏机制替代学习过程，如经验值（XP）、连续打卡（Streak）、升级（Level），让孩子产生“在玩游戏而不是学习”的感受。关键在于即时反馈设计：答对给予夸张正向鼓励（如“太棒了！”），答错不直接否定，而用缓和表达（如“差一点哦”），保护自信心。同时引入角色人格（如吉祥物老师），通过拟人化表达进行陪伴式互动（如“我在等你学习哦👀”），增强情感连接。整体设计遵循“每一步都有反馈、每句话都有情绪”，构建行为—反馈—奖励循环，提升学习粘性。应用到语文学习中，可将识字、阅读、背诵拆分为小游戏任务，用动画、奖励和鼓励语言驱动孩子持续学习，核心目标是让学习过程变得有趣、可持续、低压力。UI界面设计应围绕“游戏化路径+极简交互+强反馈动画”。首页采用关卡地图式结构（类似闯关），用节点串联识字、阅读、背诵等任务，形成清晰学习路径。主界面保持高对比色与卡通风格，按钮大而明确，减少文字说明，优先使用图标与插画表达。单个学习页面遵循“一屏一任务”，如只做一个字或一句话，避免信息过载。交互上采用点击、滑动等简单操作，配合即时动画反馈（如正确时跳动、发光，错误时轻微震动）。顶部显示进度条、星星或能量值，强化成就感；底部保持固定操作区，降低认知成本。引入角色形象（如老师或动物）常驻界面，通过表情变化参与反馈。整体布局需统一圆角、阴影与间距，形成柔和亲和的视觉体验，核心目标是让孩子“看得懂、点得爽、停不下来”。这是我的补充.然后我给你内容,你总结整理,增删,编排,执行

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-28 13:55:58Z)**_

明白了。核心设计哲学已记住：

**语言风格**：口语化短句 → 即时正向反馈 → 答错缓和不否定 → 角色陪伴拟人化

**UI结构**：关卡地图 → 一屏一任务 → 大按钮图标优先 → 顶部进度/底部操作固定 → 圆角柔和统一

**情绪循环**：行为 → 动画反馈 → 奖励，让孩子"在玩而不是在学"

```text
    37→  ...[ { label: 'Unit 1', slice: [0,8] }, { label: 'Unit 2', slice: [8,14] }, { label: 'Unit 3', slice: [14,20] }, { label: 'Unit 4', slice: [20,24] }, { label: 'Unit 5', slice: [24,30] }, { label: 'Unit 6', slice: [30,36] } ].map(u => ({ bookName: '五年级上册', bookId: 'grade5_up', data: grade5UpData, ...u, label: `五年级上册 · ${u.label}` })),
    38→]
    39→
    40→const STUDY_TIME_KEY = 'english_study_time'
    41→const LESSON_HISTORY_KEY = 'english_lesson_history'
    42→
    43→function saveStudyTime(seconds) {
    44→  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)
    45→  try {
    46→    const data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STUDY_TIME_KEY) || '{}')
    47→    data[today] = (data[today] || 0) + seconds
    48→    localStorage.setItem(STUDY_TIME_KEY, JSON.stringify(data))
    49→  } catch {}
    50→}
```
</details></tool-use>

I'll build this as a self-contained Poetry.jsx component that manages all these features internally.

```jsx
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
import poetryData from '../data/poetry.json'

const POETRY_KEY = 'poetry_progress'

function loadProgress() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(POETRY_KEY) || '{}') } catch { return {} }
}
function saveProgress(p) {
  localStorage.setItem(POETRY_KEY, JSON.stringify(p))
}

// Color themes for poems
const POEM_THEMES = [
  { bg: 'from-emerald-600 to-teal-700', light: 'bg-emerald-50', accent: 'text-emerald-400', btn: 'bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-400', ring: 'ring-emerald-400', emoji: '🌧️' },
  { bg: 'from-orange-600 to-red-700', light: 'bg-orange-50', accent: 'text-orange-400', btn: 'bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-400', ring: 'ring-orange-400', emoji: '⚔️' },
  { bg: 'from-pink-500 to-purple-700', light: 'bg-pink-50', accent: 'text-pink-400', btn: 'bg-pink-500 hover:bg-pink-400', ring: 'ring-pink-400', emoji: '🌸' },
]

// Feedback messages
const CORRECT_MSGS = ['太棒了！🎉', '真厉害！⭐', '答对了！👏', '很好！继续加油！💪', '完美！🌟']
const WRONG_MSGS = ['差一点哦 💭', '再想想看 🤔', '没关系，试试别的 😊', '加油，你可以的！💪']

function randomMsg(arr) { return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)] }

// Confetti burst animation
function ConfettiBurst({ show }) {
  if (!show) return null
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-50 overflow-hidden">
      {Array.from({ length: 30 }).map((_, i) => {
        const colors = ['#10b981', '#f59e0b', '#ef4444', '#3b82f6', '#8b5cf6', '#ec4899']
        const color = colors[i % colors.length]
        const left = 20 + Math.random() * 60
        const delay = Math.random() * 0.3
        const size = 6 + Math.random() * 8
        return (
          <div
            key={i}
            className="absolute rounded-full animate-confetti"
            style={{
              left: `${left}%`, top: '-10px',
              width: size, height: size,
              backgroundColor: color,
              animationDelay: `${delay}s`,
            }}
          />
        )
      })}
      <style>{`
        @keyframes confetti-fall {
          0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
          100% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
        }
        .animate-confetti { animation: confetti-fall 2s ease-out forwards; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

// Feedback toast
function FeedbackToast({ message, isCorrect, show }) {
  if (!show) return null
  return (
    <div className={`fixed top-20 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl text-lg font-bold transition-all duration-300 animate-bounce-in
      ${isCorrect ? 'bg-emerald-500 text-white' : 'bg-orange-500 text-white'}`}>
      {message}
      <style>{`
        @keyframes bounce-in {
          0% { transform: translate(-50%, -30px) scale(0.8); opacity: 0; }
          50% { transform: translate(-50%, 5px) scale(1.05); }
          100% { transform: translate(-50%, 0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .animate-bounce-in { animation: bounce-in 0.4s ease-out; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

// Progress bar component
function ProgressBar({ current, total, color = 'bg-emerald-500' }) {
  const pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((current / total) * 100) : 0
  return (
    <div className="w-full h-3 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className={`h-full ${color} rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out`} style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
    </div>
  )
}

// ========= STAGE: 读诗 (Read Poem) =========
function ReadStage({ poem, theme, onNext }) {
  const [showPinyin, setShowPinyin] = useState(true)
  const [showAnnotations, setShowAnnotations] = useState(false)
  const [activeAnno, setActiveAnno] = useState(null)

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-lg mx-auto flex flex-col gap-5 animate-fade-in">
      {/* Poem card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.bg} rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-2xl`}>
        <div className="text-center mb-4">
          <span className="text-4xl mb-2 block">{theme.emoji}</span>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{poem.title}</h2>
          <p className="text-white/70 text-sm mt-1">[{poem.dynasty}] {poem.author} · {poem.type}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5 backdrop-blur">
          {poem.lines.map((line, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="mb-3 text-center">
              {showPinyin && (
                <div className="text-xs text-white/50 mb-0.5 tracking-wider">{poem.pinyin[i]}</div>
              )}
              <div className="text-xl text-white font-serif tracking-widest">{line}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-center gap-3 mt-4">
          <button
            onClick={() => setShowPinyin(v => !v)}
            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium transition-all ${showPinyin ? 'bg-white/30 text-white' : 'bg-white/10 text-white/60'}`}
          >
            {showPinyin ? '隐藏拼音' : '显示拼音'}
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setShowAnnotations(v => !v)}
            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium transition-all ${showAnnotations ? 'bg-white/30 text-white' : 'bg-white/10 text-white/60'}`}
          >
            {showAnnotations ? '收起注释' : '查看注释'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Annotations */}
      {showAnnotations && (
        <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-4 animate-fade-in">
          <h3 className={`text-sm font-bold ${theme.accent} mb-3`}>📖 注释</h3>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            {poem.annotations.map((a, i) => (
              <button
                key={i}
                onClick={() => setActiveAnno(activeAnno === i ? null : i)}
                className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-sm transition-all
                  ${activeAnno === i ? `${theme.btn} text-white shadow-lg scale-105` : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}
              >
                {a.word}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          {activeAnno !== null && (
            <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-gray-800 rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-300 animate-fade-in">
              <span className={`font-bold ${theme.accent}`}>{poem.annotations[activeAnno].word}</span>
              ：{poem.annotations[activeAnno].meaning}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Meaning */}
      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-4">
        <h3 className={`text-sm font-bold ${theme.accent} mb-2`}>💡 诗意</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">{poem.meaning}</p>
      </div>

      {/* Theme */}
      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-4">
        <h3 className={`text-sm font-bold ${theme.accent} mb-2`}>🎯 主题</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">{poem.theme}</p>
      </div>

      {/* Start practice button */}
      <button
        onClick={onNext}
        className={`w-full py-4 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} text-white text-lg font-bold shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95`}
      >
        开始练习 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

// ========= STAGE: 填空 (Fill Blanks) =========
function FillBlankStage({ poem, theme, onNext, onScore }) {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0)
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null)
  const [isCorrect, setIsCorrect] = useState(null)
  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState(null)
  const [score, setScore] = useState(0)
  const [shake, setShake] = useState(false)

  const blanks = poem.fillBlanks
  const item = blanks[current]

  function handleSelect(opt) {
    if (selected !== null) return
    setSelected(opt)
    const correct = opt === item.answer
    setIsCorrect(correct)
    if (correct) {
      setScore(s => s + 1)
      setFeedback(randomMsg(CORRECT_MSGS))
    } else {
      setFeedback(randomMsg(WRONG_MSGS))
      setShake(true)
      setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500)
    }
  }

  function handleNext() {
    if (current < blanks.length - 1) {
      setCurrent(c => c + 1)
      setSelected(null)
      setIsCorrect(null)
      setFeedback(null)
    } else {
      onScore(score + (isCorrect ? 0 : 0)) // score already updated
      onNext(score)
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-lg mx-auto flex flex-col gap-5 animate-fade-in">
      <FeedbackToast message={feedback} isCorrect={isCorrect} show={feedback !== null} />

      {/* Progress */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <ProgressBar current={current + (selected !== null ? 1 : 0)} total={blanks.length} color={theme.btn.split(' ')[0]} />
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{current + 1}/{blanks.length}</span>
      </div>

      {/* Stage label */}
      <div className="text-center">
        <span className="text-2xl">✏️</span>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mt-1">填空练习</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">选择正确的字填入空白处</p>
      </div>

      {/* Question card */}
      <div className={`bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-6 text-center transition-all ${shake ? 'animate-shake border-red-500' : isCorrect === true ? `border-emerald-500` : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
        <p className="text-2xl font-serif tracking-widest text-white">
          {item.text.replace('___', selected !== null ? (isCorrect ? `【${item.answer}】` : `【${selected}→${item.answer}】`) : '＿＿')}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Options */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        {item.options.map((opt, i) => {
          let cls = 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white hover:bg-gray-700 hover:border-gray-500'
          if (selected !== null) {
            if (opt === item.answer) cls = 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white scale-105'
            else if (opt === selected && !isCorrect) cls = 'bg-red-600/50 border-red-500 text-white'
            else cls = 'bg-gray-800/50 border-gray-800 text-gray-600'
          }
          return (
            <button
              key={i}
              onClick={() => handleSelect(opt)}
              disabled={selected !== null}
              className={`py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-xl font-bold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 ${cls}`}
            >
              {opt}
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Next button */}
      {selected !== null && (
        <button
          onClick={handleNext}
          className={`w-full py-4 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} text-white text-lg font-bold shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95 animate-fade-in`}
        >
          {current < blanks.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '进入选择题 →'}
        </button>
      )}

      <style>{`
        @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 20%{transform:translateX(-8px)} 40%{transform:translateX(8px)} 60%{transform:translateX(-4px)} 80%{transform:translateX(4px)} }
        .animate-shake { animation: shake 0.4s ease-out; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

// ========= STAGE: 选择题 (Quiz) =========
function QuizStage({ poem, theme, onComplete }) {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0)
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null)
  const [isCorrect, setIsCorrect] = useState(null)
  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState(null)
  const [score, setScore] = useState(0)
  const [showConfetti, setShowConfetti] = useState(false)
  const [shake, setShake] = useState(false)

  const questions = poem.quiz
  const q = questions[current]

  function handleSelect(idx) {
    if (selected !== null) return
    setSelected(idx)
    const correct = idx === q.answer
    setIsCorrect(correct)
    if (correct) {
      setScore(s => s + 1)
      setFeedback(randomMsg(CORRECT_MSGS))
    } else {
      setFeedback(randomMsg(WRONG_MSGS))
      setShake(true)
      setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500)
    }
  }

  function handleNext() {
    if (current < questions.length - 1) {
      setCurrent(c => c + 1)
      setSelected(null)
      setIsCorrect(null)
      setFeedback(null)
    } else {
      setShowConfetti(true)
      setTimeout(() => {
        onComplete(score + (isCorrect ? 1 : 0))
      }, 1500)
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-lg mx-auto flex flex-col gap-5 animate-fade-in">
      <ConfettiBurst show={showConfetti} />
      <FeedbackToast message={feedback} isCorrect={isCorrect} show={feedback !== null} />

      {/* Progress */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <ProgressBar current={current + (selected !== null ? 1 : 0)} total={questions.length} color={theme.btn.split(' ')[0]} />
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{current + 1}/{questions.length}</span>
      </div>

      {/* Stage label */}
      <div className="text-center">
        <span className="text-2xl">🧠</span>
        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mt-1">理解练习</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">选择正确的答案</p>
      </div>

      {/* Question card */}
      <div className={`bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all ${shake ? 'animate-shake border-red-500' : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
        <p className="text-lg text-white font-medium leading-relaxed">{q.question}</p>
      </div>

      {/* Options */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2.5">
        {q.options.map((opt, i) => {
          const labels = ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D']
          let cls = 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white hover:bg-gray-700'
          if (selected !== null) {
            if (i === q.answer) cls = 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white'
            else if (i === selected && !isCorrect) cls = 'bg-red-600/50 border-red-500 text-white'
            else cls = 'bg-gray-800/50 border-gray-800 text-gray-600'
          }
          return (
            <button
              key={i}
              onClick={() => handleSelect(i)}
              disabled={selected !== null}
              className={`w-full py-3.5 px-5 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left text-base font-medium transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-3 active:scale-[0.98] ${cls}`}
            >
              <span className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-black/20 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold shrink-0">{labels[i]}</span>
              {opt}
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Next button */}
      {selected !== null && !showConfetti && (
        <button
          onClick={handleNext}
          className={`w-full py-4 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} text-white text-lg font-bold shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95 animate-fade-in`}
        >
          {current < questions.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '完成！🎉'}
        </button>
      )}

      <style>{`
        @keyframes shake { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 20%{transform:translateX(-8px)} 40%{transform:translateX(8px)} 60%{transform:translateX(-4px)} 80%{transform:translateX(4px)} }
        .animate-shake { animation: shake 0.4s ease-out; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

// ========= STAGE: 完成 (Complete) =========
function CompleteStage({ poem, theme, fillScore, quizScore, onBack }) {
  const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
  const totalScore = fillScore + quizScore
  const pct = Math.round((totalScore / totalQ) * 100)
  const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-lg mx-auto flex flex-col items-center gap-6 animate-fade-in text-center">
      <div className="text-6xl mt-4">
        {stars === 3 ? '🏆' : stars === 2 ? '⭐' : '💪'}
      </div>
      <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
        {stars === 3 ? '完美通关！' : stars === 2 ? '表现不错！' : '继续加油！'}
      </h2>

      {/* Stars display */}
      <div className="flex gap-2 text-4xl">
        {[1, 2, 3].map(s => (
          <span key={s} className={s <= stars ? 'animate-star-pop' : 'opacity-30'} style={{ animationDelay: `${s * 0.2}s` }}>⭐</span>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Score card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.bg} rounded-3xl p-6 w-full shadow-2xl`}>
        <h3 className="text-white font-bold text-lg mb-4">《{poem.title}》学习报告</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-4">
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{fillScore}/{poem.fillBlanks.length}</div>
            <div className="text-white/60 text-sm mt-1">填空正确</div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-4">
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{quizScore}/{poem.quiz.length}</div>
            <div className="text-white/60 text-sm mt-1">选择正确</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-4 bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-4">
          <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-white">{pct}%</div>
          <div className="text-white/60 text-sm mt-1">总正确率</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* XP reward */}
      <div className="bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-600/30 rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-3">
        <span className="text-2xl">✨</span>
        <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold text-lg">+{totalScore * 10} XP</span>
      </div>

      <button
        onClick={onBack}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white text-lg font-bold transition-all active:scale-95"
      >
        返回古诗列表
      </button>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes star-pop {
          0% { transform: scale(0) rotate(-30deg); opacity: 0; }
          60% { transform: scale(1.3) rotate(10deg); opacity: 1; }
          100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
        }
        .animate-star-pop { animation: star-pop 0.5s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

// ========= MAIN: Poetry Module =========
export default function Poetry({ onClose, onSetBack }) {
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(loadProgress)
  const [selectedPoem, setSelectedPoem] = useState(null) // poem id
  const [stage, setStage] = useState('read') // read | fill | quiz | complete
  const [fillScore, setFillScore] = useState(0)
  const [quizScore, setQuizScore] = useState(0)

  useEffect(() => {
    onSetBack?.(selectedPoem ? () => () => { setSelectedPoem(null); setStage('read') } : null)
  }, [selectedPoem, onSetBack])

  const poem = selectedPoem ? poetryData.find(p => p.id === selectedPoem) : null
  const themeIdx = poem ? (poem.id - 1) % POEM_THEMES.length : 0
  const theme = POEM_THEMES[themeIdx]

  function handleComplete(qScore) {
    const p = { ...progress }
    const key = `poem_${selectedPoem}`
    const prev = p[key] || { stars: 0, bestPct: 0, attempts: 0 }
    const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
    const total = fillScore + qScore
    const pct = Math.round((total / totalQ) * 100)
    const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1
    p[key] = {
      stars: Math.max(prev.stars, stars),
      bestPct: Math.max(prev.bestPct, pct),
      attempts: (prev.attempts || 0) + 1,
    }
    setProgress(p)
    saveProgress(p)
    setQuizScore(qScore)
    setStage('complete')
  }

  // Poem detail view
  if (poem) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
        {stage === 'read' && (
          <ReadStage poem={poem} theme={theme} onNext={() => setStage('fill')} />
        )}
        {stage === 'fill' && (
          <FillBlankStage poem={poem} theme={theme} onNext={(score) => { setFillScore(score); setStage('quiz') }} onScore={() => {}} />
        )}
        {stage === 'quiz' && (
          <QuizStage poem={poem} theme={theme} onComplete={handleComplete} />
        )}
        {stage === 'complete' && (
          <CompleteStage
            poem={poem} theme={theme}
            fillScore={fillScore} quizScore={quizScore}
            onBack={() => { setSelectedPoem(null); setStage('read') }}
          />
        )}

        <style>{`
          @keyframes fade-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
          .animate-fade-in { animation: fade-in 0.35s ease-out; }
        `}</style>
      </div>
    )
  }

  // ========= Poem list (关卡地图 style) =========
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-lg mx-auto px-4 py-6">
      <div className="text-center mb-8">
        <span className="text-4xl block mb-2">📜</span>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">古诗三首</h1>
        <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">四年级下册 · 读诗、填空、选择</p>
      </div>

      {/* Map path */}
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
        {poetryData.map((p, i) => {
          const t = POEM_THEMES[i % POEM_THEMES.length]
          const key = `poem_${p.id}`
          const pg = progress[key] || { stars: 0, bestPct: 0, attempts: 0 }
          const isLocked = false // all unlocked for now

          return (
            <div key={p.id} className="w-full flex flex-col items-center">
              {/* Connecting line */}
              {i > 0 && <div className="w-0.5 h-6 bg-gray-800 -mt-4 mb-0" />}

              <button
                onClick={() => { setSelectedPoem(p.id); setStage('read'); setFillScore(0); setQuizScore(0) }}
                disabled={isLocked}
                className={`w-full bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-5 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
                  ${pg.stars > 0 ? `border-emerald-600/50 shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20` : 'border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600'}`}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                  {/* Level icon */}
                  <div className={`w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${t.bg} flex items-center justify-center text-3xl shrink-0 shadow-lg`}>
                    {pg.stars >= 3 ? '🏆' : t.emoji}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1 text-left min-w-0">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className="text-white font-bold text-lg">第{i + 1}关</span>
                      {pg.stars > 0 && (
                        <span className="text-yellow-400 text-sm">
                          {'⭐'.repeat(pg.stars)}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-white font-medium">《{p.title}》</div>
                    <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm">[{p.dynasty}] {p.author} · {p.type}</div>
                    {pg.attempts > 0 && (
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">
                        最佳 {pg.bestPct}% · 已练{pg.attempts}次
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`text-2xl ${pg.stars > 0 ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                    {pg.stars > 0 ? '✓' : '→'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </button>
            </div>
          )
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Total XP */}
      {Object.keys(progress).length > 0 && (
        <div className="mt-8 text-center">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-600/30 rounded-2xl px-5 py-2.5">
            <span className="text-xl">✨</span>
            <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">
              总 XP: {Object.values(progress).reduce((s, p) => s + (p.bestPct || 0), 0) * 10}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-28 14:07:32Z)**_

The problem is clear — the `""` characters inside the question strings are ASCII double quotes (U+0022) which break JSON. They need to be escaped as `\"` or replaced. Let me fix by replacing all inner `""` with `「」`:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-28 14:07:43Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Fix all inner ASCII quotes in JSON strings

```bash
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open('src/data/poetry.json', 'r') as f:
    text = f.read()

# Fix: within JSON string values, replace patterns like "word" (Chinese quotes using ASCII ") 
# with 「word」
# Strategy: process each line, for lines with "question" or "theme", fix inner quotes

lines = text.split('\n')
fixed = []
for line in lines:
    stripped = line.strip()
    if ('"question"' in stripped or '"theme"' in stripped) and '：' in stripped:
        # Extract the JSON value part
        # Find the value after the key
        colon_pos = line.index('": "') + 4
        # Everything from colon_pos to the trailing ", or "
        end_pos = line.rindex('"')
        if end_pos > colon_pos:
            value = line[colon_pos:end_pos]
            # Replace "X" patterns (Chinese style quoting) with 「X」
            value = re.sub(r'"([^"]{1,20})"', r'「\1」', value)
            line = line[:colon_pos] + value + line[end_pos:]
    fixed.append(line)

text = '\n'.join(fixed)

with open('src/data/poetry.json', 'w') as f:
    f.write(text)

import json
with open('src/data/poetry.json', 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
print(f'Valid JSON! {len(data)} poems')
for p in data:
    print(f'  {p["title"]}: {len(p["fillBlanks"])} fill + {len(p["quiz"])} quiz')
PYEOF
```

```text

    return loads(fp.read(),
  File "/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/Library/Frameworks/Python3.framework/Versions/3.9/lib/python3.9/json/__init__.py", line 346, in loads
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-28 14:10:50Z)**_

构建成功。古诗模块已完成，功能如下：

**关卡地图式首页**（3首诗 = 3个关卡）
- 第1关：《芙蓉楼送辛渐》🌧️ 送别诗
- 第2关：《塞下曲》⚔️ 边塞诗  
- 第3关：《白梅》🌸 咏物诗

**每关学习流程（一屏一任务）**：
1. **读诗** — 诗文 + 拼音（可隐藏）+ 注释（点击词展开）+ 诗意 + 主题
2. **填空** — 4题选字填空，选对弹出「太棒了！🎉」，选错轻震+「差一点哦 💭」
3. **选择** — 5题理解题，ABCD 选项卡片
4. **完成** — 星级评定（1-3星）+ 得分报告 + XP 奖励 + 彩纸动画

**多邻国风格**：
- 大圆角卡片、渐变色主题、即时动画反馈
- 进度条实时推进、XP 经验值、星级成就
- 答对正向鼓励、答错不否定、保护自信心
- localStorage 记录最佳成绩和练习次数

刷新 http://localhost:8765 → 点击顶栏「古诗」即可体验。

---

```jsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import poetryData from './data/poetry.json'
import './index.css'

// ============ 持久化 ============
const KEY = 'poetry_progress'
function loadProgress() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(KEY) || '{}') } catch { return {} } }
function saveProgress(p) { localStorage.setItem(KEY, JSON.stringify(p)) }

// ============ 配色主题 ============
const THEMES = [
  { bg: 'from-emerald-500 to-teal-600', btn: 'bg-emerald-500', btnH: 'hover:bg-emerald-400 active:bg-emerald-600', accent: 'text-emerald-400', emoji: '🌧️', ring: 'border-emerald-500' },
  { bg: 'from-orange-500 to-red-600', btn: 'bg-orange-500', btnH: 'hover:bg-orange-400 active:bg-orange-600', accent: 'text-orange-400', emoji: '⚔️', ring: 'border-orange-500' },
  { bg: 'from-pink-500 to-purple-600', btn: 'bg-pink-500', btnH: 'hover:bg-pink-400 active:bg-pink-600', accent: 'text-pink-400', emoji: '🌸', ring: 'border-pink-500' },
]

// ============ 反馈语 ============
const CHEERS = ['太棒了！🎉', '真厉害！⭐', '完美！🌟', '答对啦！👏', '你真聪明！💪']
const MISS = ['差一点哦～💭', '再想想看 🤔', '没关系，加油！😊', '试试别的吧 💪']
const pick = a => a[Math.floor(Math.random() * a.length)]

// ============ 彩纸动画 ============
function Confetti({ show }) {
  if (!show) return null
  const colors = ['#10b981','#f59e0b','#ef4444','#3b82f6','#8b5cf6','#ec4899','#06b6d4']
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-50">
      {Array.from({ length: 40 }).map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="absolute rounded-full" style={{
          left: `${15 + Math.random() * 70}%`, top: '-12px',
          width: 6 + Math.random() * 10, height: 6 + Math.random() * 10,
          backgroundColor: colors[i % colors.length],
          animation: `confetti ${1.5 + Math.random()}s ease-out ${Math.random() * 0.4}s forwards`,
        }} />
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

// ============ Toast ============
function Toast({ msg, ok, show }) {
  if (!show) return null
  return (
    <div className={`fixed top-24 left-1/2 z-50 px-8 py-4 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl text-xl font-bold
      ${ok ? 'bg-emerald-500 text-white' : 'bg-orange-500 text-white'}`}
      style={{ transform: 'translateX(-50%)', animation: 'pop 0.35s ease-out' }}>
      {msg}
    </div>
  )
}

// ============ 进度条 ============
function Bar({ n, total, color = 'bg-emerald-500' }) {
  const pct = total > 0 ? (n / total) * 100 : 0
  return (
    <div className="w-full h-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
      <div className={`h-full ${color} rounded-full transition-all duration-700 ease-out`} style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
    </div>
  )
}

// ================================
//         读诗 Stage
// ================================
function StageRead({ poem, theme, onNext }) {
  const [pinyin, setPinyin] = useState(true)
  const [anno, setAnno] = useState(false)
  const [pick, setPick] = useState(null)

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-in">
      {/* 诗卡 */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.bg} rounded-[2rem] p-8 shadow-2xl`}>
        <div className="text-center mb-5">
          <span className="text-5xl block mb-3">{theme.emoji}</span>
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{poem.title}</h2>
          <p className="text-white/60 text-lg mt-1">[{poem.dynasty}] {poem.author} · {poem.type}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-6 backdrop-blur">
          {poem.lines.map((line, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="mb-4 text-center">
              {pinyin && <div className="text-sm text-white/40 tracking-wider mb-1">{poem.pinyin[i]}</div>}
              <div className="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-white font-serif tracking-[0.3em]">{line}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mt-5">
          <button onClick={() => setPinyin(v => !v)}
            className={`px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-base font-medium transition-all ${pinyin ? 'bg-white/30 text-white' : 'bg-white/10 text-white/50'}`}>
            {pinyin ? '隐藏拼音' : '显示拼音'}
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setAnno(v => !v)}
            className={`px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-base font-medium transition-all ${anno ? 'bg-white/30 text-white' : 'bg-white/10 text-white/50'}`}>
            {anno ? '收起注释' : '查看注释'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 注释 */}
      {anno && (
        <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-5 animate-in">
          <h3 className={`text-lg font-bold ${theme.accent} mb-4`}>📖 注释</h3>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
            {poem.annotations.map((a, i) => (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => setPick(pick === i ? null : i)}
                className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-base transition-all
                  ${pick === i ? `${theme.btn} text-white shadow-lg scale-105` : 'bg-gray-800 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700'}`}>
                {a.word}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          {pick !== null && (
            <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-gray-800 rounded-xl text-base text-gray-300 animate-in">
              <span className={`font-bold ${theme.accent}`}>{poem.annotations[pick].word}</span>：{poem.annotations[pick].meaning}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 诗意 */}
      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-5">
        <h3 className={`text-lg font-bold ${theme.accent} mb-3`}>💡 诗意</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-300 text-lg leading-relaxed">{poem.meaning}</p>
      </div>

      {/* 主题 */}
      <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-5">
        <h3 className={`text-lg font-bold ${theme.accent} mb-3`}>🎯 主题</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-300 text-lg leading-relaxed">{poem.theme}</p>
      </div>

      {/* 开始按钮 */}
      <button onClick={onNext}
        className={`w-full py-5 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} ${theme.btnH} text-white text-xl font-bold shadow-xl transition-all`}>
        开始练习 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

// ================================
//         填空 Stage
// ================================
function StageFill({ poem, theme, onNext }) {
  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
  const [sel, setSel] = useState(null)
  const [ok, setOk] = useState(null)
  const [toast, setToast] = useState(null)
  const [score, setScore] = useState(0)
  const [shake, setShake] = useState(false)

  const items = poem.fillBlanks
  const q = items[idx]

  function select(opt) {
    if (sel !== null) return
    setSel(opt)
    const correct = opt === q.answer
    setOk(correct)
    if (correct) { setScore(s => s + 1); setToast(pick(CHEERS)) }
    else { setToast(pick(MISS)); setShake(true); setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500) }
    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 1200)
  }

  function next() {
    if (idx < items.length - 1) { setIdx(i => i + 1); setSel(null); setOk(null) }
    else onNext(score)
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-in">
      <Toast msg={toast} ok={ok} show={!!toast} />
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <Bar n={idx + (sel !== null ? 1 : 0)} total={items.length} color={theme.btn} />
        <span className="text-base text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{idx + 1}/{items.length}</span>
      </div>

      <div className="text-center">
        <span className="text-4xl">✏️</span>
        <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-2">填空练习</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-500 text-lg">选择正确的字填入空白处</p>
      </div>

      <div className={`bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-8 text-center transition-all
        ${shake ? 'shake border-red-500' : ok ? theme.ring : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
        <p className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif tracking-[0.2em] text-white">
          {q.text.replace('___', sel !== null ? (ok ? `【${q.answer}】` : `【${sel}→${q.answer}】`) : '＿＿')}
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {q.options.map((opt, i) => {
          let cls = 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white'
          if (sel !== null) {
            if (opt === q.answer) cls = 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white scale-105'
            else if (opt === sel && !ok) cls = 'bg-red-600/50 border-red-500 text-white'
            else cls = 'bg-gray-800/40 border-gray-800 text-gray-600'
          }
          return (
            <button key={i} onClick={() => select(opt)} disabled={sel !== null}
              className={`py-5 rounded-2xl border-2 text-2xl font-bold transition-all duration-200 ${cls}`}>
              {opt}
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>

      {sel !== null && (
        <button onClick={next}
          className={`w-full py-5 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} ${theme.btnH} text-white text-xl font-bold shadow-xl transition-all animate-in`}>
          {idx < items.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '进入理解题 →'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ================================
//         选择题 Stage
// ================================
function StageQuiz({ poem, theme, onComplete }) {
  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
  const [sel, setSel] = useState(null)
  const [ok, setOk] = useState(null)
  const [toast, setToast] = useState(null)
  const [score, setScore] = useState(0)
  const [shake, setShake] = useState(false)
  const [confetti, setConfetti] = useState(false)

  const qs = poem.quiz
  const q = qs[idx]
  const labels = ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D']

  function select(i) {
    if (sel !== null) return
    setSel(i)
    const correct = i === q.answer
    setOk(correct)
    if (correct) { setScore(s => s + 1); setToast(pick(CHEERS)) }
    else { setToast(pick(MISS)); setShake(true); setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500) }
    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 1200)
  }

  function next() {
    if (idx < qs.length - 1) { setIdx(i => i + 1); setSel(null); setOk(null) }
    else { setConfetti(true); setTimeout(() => onComplete(score + (ok ? 1 : 0)), 1500) }
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-in">
      <Confetti show={confetti} />
      <Toast msg={toast} ok={ok} show={!!toast} />

      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <Bar n={idx + (sel !== null ? 1 : 0)} total={qs.length} color={theme.btn} />
        <span className="text-base text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{idx + 1}/{qs.length}</span>
      </div>

      <div className="text-center">
        <span className="text-4xl">🧠</span>
        <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-2">理解练习</h3>
        <p className="text-gray-500 text-lg">选择正确的答案</p>
      </div>

      <div className={`bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all
        ${shake ? 'shake border-red-500' : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
        <p className="text-xl text-white font-medium leading-relaxed">{q.question}</p>
      </div>

      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
        {q.options.map((opt, i) => {
          let cls = 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white'
          if (sel !== null) {
            if (i === q.answer) cls = 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white'
            else if (i === sel && !ok) cls = 'bg-red-600/50 border-red-500 text-white'
            else cls = 'bg-gray-800/40 border-gray-800 text-gray-600'
          }
          return (
            <button key={i} onClick={() => select(i)} disabled={sel !== null}
              className={`w-full py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left text-lg font-medium transition-all flex items-center gap-4 ${cls}`}>
              <span className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-black/20 flex items-center justify-center text-base font-bold shrink-0">{labels[i]}</span>
              {opt}
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>

      {sel !== null && !confetti && (
        <button onClick={next}
          className={`w-full py-5 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} ${theme.btnH} text-white text-xl font-bold shadow-xl transition-all animate-in`}>
          {idx < qs.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '完成！🎉'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// ================================
//         完成 Stage
// ================================
function StageDone({ poem, theme, fillScore, quizScore, onBack }) {
  const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
  const total = fillScore + quizScore
  const pct = Math.round((total / totalQ) * 100)
  const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-8 animate-in text-center">
      <div className="text-7xl mt-6">{stars === 3 ? '🏆' : stars === 2 ? '⭐' : '💪'}</div>
      <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{stars === 3 ? '完美通关！' : stars === 2 ? '表现不错！' : '继续加油！'}</h2>

      <div className="flex gap-3 text-5xl">
        {[1, 2, 3].map(s => (
          <span key={s} style={{ opacity: s <= stars ? 1 : 0.2, animation: s <= stars ? `star ${0.5}s ease-out ${s * 0.2}s both` : 'none' }}>⭐</span>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.bg} rounded-3xl p-8 w-full shadow-2xl`}>
        <h3 className="text-white font-bold text-xl mb-5">《{poem.title}》学习报告</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-5">
          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5">
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-white">{fillScore}/{poem.fillBlanks.length}</div>
            <div className="text-white/60 text-base mt-2">填空正确</div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5">
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-white">{quizScore}/{poem.quiz.length}</div>
            <div className="text-white/60 text-base mt-2">选择正确</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-5 bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5">
          <div className="text-5xl font-bold text-white">{pct}%</div>
          <div className="text-white/60 text-base mt-2">总正确率</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-600/30 rounded-2xl px-8 py-4 flex items-center gap-4">
        <span className="text-3xl">✨</span>
        <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold text-2xl">+{total * 10} XP</span>
      </div>

      <button onClick={onBack}
        className="w-full py-5 rounded-2xl bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-700 text-white text-xl font-bold transition-all">
        返回古诗列表
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

// ================================
//         主应用
// ================================
export default function App() {
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(loadProgress)
  const [poemId, setPoemId] = useState(null)
  const [stage, setStage] = useState('read')
  const [fillScore, setFillScore] = useState(0)
  const [quizScore, setQuizScore] = useState(0)

  const poem = poemId ? poetryData.find(p => p.id === poemId) : null
  const theme = poem ? THEMES[(poem.id - 1) % THEMES.length] : THEMES[0]

  function startPoem(id) {
    setPoemId(id); setStage('read'); setFillScore(0); setQuizScore(0)
    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
  }

  function handleComplete(qScore) {
    const p = { ...progress }
    const key = `poem_${poemId}`
    const prev = p[key] || { stars: 0, bestPct: 0, attempts: 0 }
    const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
    const total = fillScore + qScore
    const pct = Math.round((total / totalQ) * 100)
    const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1
    p[key] = { stars: Math.max(prev.stars, stars), bestPct: Math.max(prev.bestPct, pct), attempts: (prev.attempts || 0) + 1 }
    setProgress(p); saveProgress(p); setQuizScore(qScore); setStage('done')
  }

  // ---- 学习页 ----
  if (poem) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] flex flex-col">
        {/* 顶栏 */}
        <header className="sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#0a0a0a]/90 backdrop-blur border-b border-gray-800/50 px-5 py-3 flex items-center gap-4">
          <button onClick={() => setPoemId(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-lg font-medium flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors">
            ← 返回
          </button>
          <div className="flex-1 text-center">
            <span className="text-white font-bold text-lg">《{poem.title}》</span>
            <span className="text-gray-600 text-sm ml-2">
              {stage === 'read' ? '阅读' : stage === 'fill' ? '填空' : stage === 'quiz' ? '选择' : '完成'}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div className="w-16" />
        </header>

        <main className="flex-1 px-5 py-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
          {stage === 'read' && <StageRead poem={poem} theme={theme} onNext={() => { setStage('fill'); window.scrollTo(0, 0) }} />}
          {stage === 'fill' && <StageFill poem={poem} theme={theme} onNext={(s) => { setFillScore(s); setStage('quiz'); window.scrollTo(0, 0) }} />}
          {stage === 'quiz' && <StageQuiz poem={poem} theme={theme} onComplete={handleComplete} />}
          {stage === 'done' && <StageDone poem={poem} theme={theme} fillScore={fillScore} quizScore={quizScore} onBack={() => setPoemId(null)} />}
        </main>
      </div>
    )
  }

  // ---- 首页：关卡地图 ----
  const totalXP = Object.values(progress).reduce((s, p) => s + ((p.bestPct || 0) * 10), 0)

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] flex flex-col">
      {/* 顶栏 */}
      <header className="sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#0a0a0a]/90 backdrop-blur border-b border-gray-800/50 px-5 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <span className="text-3xl">📜</span>
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-white leading-tight">古诗学堂</h1>
            <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">四年级下册 · 古诗三首</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        {totalXP > 0 && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-600/30 rounded-full px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-lg">✨</span>
            <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{totalXP} XP</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </header>

      <main className="flex-1 px-5 py-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
        {/* 关卡地图 */}
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-5">
          {poetryData.map((p, i) => {
            const t = THEMES[i % THEMES.length]
            const pg = progress[`poem_${p.id}`] || { stars: 0, bestPct: 0, attempts: 0 }
            return (
              <div key={p.id} className="w-full flex flex-col items-center">
                {i > 0 && <div className="w-1 h-8 bg-gray-800 rounded-full -mt-5 mb-0" />}
                <button onClick={() => startPoem(p.id)}
                  className={`w-full bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
                    ${pg.stars > 0 ? `${t.ring} shadow-lg` : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-5">
                    <div className={`w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${t.bg} flex items-center justify-center text-4xl shrink-0 shadow-lg`}>
                      {pg.stars >= 3 ? '🏆' : t.emoji}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex-1 text-left min-w-0">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                        <span className="text-white font-bold text-xl">第{i + 1}关</span>
                        {pg.stars > 0 && <span className="text-yellow-400 text-base">{'⭐'.repeat(pg.stars)}</span>}
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-white text-lg font-medium">《{p.title}》</div>
                      <div className="text-gray-500 text-base">[{p.dynasty}] {p.author} · {p.type}</div>
                      {pg.attempts > 0 && (
                        <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">最佳 {pg.bestPct}% · 已练{pg.attempts}次</div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className={`text-3xl ${pg.stars > 0 ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                      {pg.stars > 0 ? '✓' : '→'}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </button>
              </div>
            )
          })}
        </div>

        {/* 学习提示 */}
        <div className="mt-10 text-center text-gray-600 text-base">
          <p>每关流程：读诗 → 填空 → 选择 → 星级评定</p>
          <p className="mt-1">在 iPad 上横屏体验更佳 🖥️</p>
        </div>
      </main>

      {/* 全局样式 */}
      <style>{`
        @keyframes confetti {
          0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
          100% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
        }
        @keyframes pop {
          0% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.7); opacity: 0; }
          60% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1.08); }
          100% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        }
        @keyframes star {
          0% { transform: scale(0) rotate(-30deg); opacity: 0; }
          60% { transform: scale(1.3) rotate(10deg); opacity: 1; }
          100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
        }
        @keyframes fade-in {
          from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
          to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .animate-in { animation: fade-in 0.3s ease-out; }
        .shake { animation: shake 0.4s ease-out; }
        @keyframes shake {
          0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); }
          20% { transform: translateX(-10px); }
          40% { transform: translateX(10px); }
          60% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
          80% { transform: translateX(5px); }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-28 21:10:49Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants me to restate their requirements before implementing. Let me summarize what they want:

1. Add a handwriting practice stage to each poem in the poetry app
2. Practice writing Chinese characters (生字 - new/key characters from the poems)
3. Two phases: first trace (描红 - red outline tracing), then write from memory (默写)
4. Use Apple Pencil for writing on iPad
5. One character per screen, large size for easy writing
6. Design brush tools and color palette with proper rendering
7. This is for the standalone poetry-app on port 8767

Let me restate this clearly in Chinese.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-28 21:10:57Z)**_

## 需求重述

**在独立古诗app（poetry-app）中，为每首古诗新增一个「手写生字」关卡：**

1. **关卡流程**：读诗 → 填空 → 选择 → **手写生字** → 星级评定

2. **手写模式**：
   - **一字一屏**，字要尽量大，方便 iPad + Apple Pencil 书写
   - 每首诗选取关键生字（如「芙蓉楼送辛渐」→ 寒、洛、壶 等）
   - **先描红**：屏幕显示浅红色大字，用户在上面描摹（有笔画引导）
   - **后默写**：空白画布，用户凭记忆独立书写

3. **笔刷与色盘**：
   - 设计毛笔风格笔刷（压感适配 Apple Pencil，笔画有粗细变化）
   - 提供色盘可选墨色（黑、深灰、红、蓝等）
   - 做好笔画渲染效果（流畅、有毛笔质感）

4. **交互细节**：
   - 每个字写完后有「下一个」按钮
   - 提供「清除重写」功能
   - 描红阶段可切换到默写阶段

确认无误的话我就开始做。

---

```text
   301→function StageDone({ poem, theme, fillScore, quizScore, onBack }) {
   302→  const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
   303→  const total = fillScore + quizScore
   304→  const pct = Math.round((total / totalQ) * 100)
   305→  const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1
   306→
   307→  return (
   308→    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-8 animate-in text-center">
   309→      <div className="text-7xl mt-6">{stars === 3 ? '🏆' : stars === 2 ? '⭐' : '💪'}</div>
   310→      <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{stars === 3 ? '完美通关！' : stars === 2 ? '表现不错！' : '继续加油！'}</h2>
   311→
   312→      <div className="flex gap-3 text-5xl">
   313→        {[1, 2, 3].map(s => (
   314→          <span key={s} style={{ opacity: s <= stars ? 1 : 0.2, animation: s <= stars ? `star ${0.5}s ease-out ${s * 0.2}s both` : 'none' }}>⭐</span>
   315→        ))}
   316→      </div>
   317→
   318→      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.bg} rounded-3xl p-8 w-full shadow-2xl`}>
   319→        <h3 className="text-white font-bold text-xl mb-5">《{poem.title}》学习报告</h3>
   320→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-5">
   321→          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5">
   322→            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-white">{fillScore}/{poem.fillBlanks.length}</div>
   323→            <div className="text-white/60 text-base mt-2">填空正确</div>
   324→          </div>
   325→          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5">
   326→            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-white">{quizScore}/{poem.quiz.length}</div>

   328→          </div>
   329→        </div>
   330→        <div className="mt-5 bg-black/20 rounded-2xl p-5">
   331→          <div className="text-5xl font-bold text-white">{pct}%</div>
   332→          <div className="text-white/60 text-base mt-2">总正确率</div>
```

```text
   509→        </h3>
```

```text
   655→  function startPoem(id) {
   656→    setPoemId(id); setStage('read'); setFillScore(0); setQuizScore(0)

   659→
   660→  function handleComplete(qScore) {
   661→    const p = { ...progress }
   662→    const key = `poem_${poemId}`
   663→    const prev = p[key] || { stars: 0, bestPct: 0, attempts: 0 }
   664→    const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
   665→    const total = fillScore + qScore
   666→    const pct = Math.round((total / totalQ) * 100)
   667→    const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1
   668→    p[key] = { stars: Math.max(prev.stars, stars), bestPct: Math.max(prev.bestPct, pct), attempts: (prev.attempts || 0) + 1 }
   669→    setProgress(p); saveProgress(p); setQuizScore(qScore); setStage('done')
   670→  }
   671→
   672→  // ---- 学习页 ----
   673→  if (poem) {
   674→    return (
   675→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] flex flex-col">
   676→        {/* 顶栏 */}

   680→          </button>
   681→          <div className="flex-1 text-center">

   683→            <span className="text-gray-600 text-sm ml-2">
   684→              {stage === 'read' ? '阅读' : stage === 'fill' ? '填空' : stage === 'quiz' ? '选择' : '完成'}
   685→            </span>
   686→          </div>
   687→          <div className="w-16" />
   688→        </header>
   689→
   690→        <main className="flex-1 px-5 py-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
   691→          {stage === 'read' && <StageRead poem={poem} theme={theme} onNext={() => { setStage('fill'); window.scrollTo(0, 0) }} />}
   692→          {stage === 'fill' && <StageFill poem={poem} theme={theme} onNext={(s) => { setFillScore(s); setStage('quiz'); window.scrollTo(0, 0) }} />}
   693→          {stage === 'quiz' && <StageQuiz poem={poem} theme={theme} onComplete={handleComplete} />}
   694→          {stage === 'done' && <StageDone poem={poem} theme={theme} fillScore={fillScore} quizScore={quizScore} onBack={() => setPoemId(null)} />}
```

_**User (2026-03-28 21:31:10Z)**_

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User wants a **standalone** Duolingo-style gamified Chinese classical poetry learning app for **iPad** use (NOT embedded in the English input app)
   - Content: Three poems from 四年级下册 古诗三首 (extracted from textbook photos): 芙蓉楼送辛渐, 塞下曲, 白梅
   - UI philosophy: "游戏化路径+极简交互+强反馈动画", game-like map, one-screen-one-task, instant animated feedback, encouragement on correct/gentle on wrong
   - Latest feature request: **Handwriting practice stage (手写生字)** with 描红→默写 flow, Apple Pencil support, one char per screen (large), brush/color palette with rendering
   - Also requested: remove poetry module, 填空 button, and 选择 button from the english-input-app

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Vite + React + Tailwind CSS standalone project
   - iPad-optimized PWA-like web app (viewport meta, apple-mobile-web-app-capable)
   - Canvas API with Pointer Events for Apple Pencil pressure sensitivity
   - Quadratic Bezier curves for smooth brush strokes
   - 米字格 (cross-hatch grid) for character writing guide
   - 描红 (red trace guide) rendering with transparent large character
   - Duolingo gamification: XP, stars, progress bars, confetti, toast feedback
   - localStorage for progress persistence
   - Network hosting via `0.0.0.0` for iPad access over WiFi

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`/Users/hong/poetry-app/vite.config.js`** - Vite config with tailwind, port 8767, host 0.0.0.0
     ```js
     import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
     import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'
     import tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite'
     export default defineConfig({
       plugins: [react(), tailwindcss()],
       server: { port: 8766, host: '0.0.0.0' },
       preview: { port: 8766, host: '0.0.0.0' },
     })
     ```

   - **`/Users/hong/poetry-app/index.html`** - iPad-optimized HTML with apple-mobile-web-app-capable, emoji favicon, zh-CN lang
     ```html
     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
     <title>古诗学堂</title>
     ```

   - **`/Users/hong/poetry-app/src/index.css`** - Tailwind import + global styles (black bg, PingFang SC font, no tap highlight, no user select)

   - **`/Users/hong/poetry-app/src/data/poetry.json`** - Three poems with full data structure. Each poem has: id, title, author, dynasty, type, lines, pinyin, annotations, meaning, theme, fillBlanks (4 each), quiz (5 each), and **characters** (4 each for handwriting). Chinese curly quotes replaced with `「」` corner brackets.
     - Poem 1 characters: 芙, 蓉, 洛, 壶
     - Poem 2 characters: 塞, 遁, 骑, 弓
     - Poem 3 characters: 著, 芳, 乾, 坤

   - **`/Users/hong/poetry-app/src/App.jsx`** - The entire app in one file (~700+ lines). Contains:
     - **Utility**: loadProgress/saveProgress (localStorage), THEMES (3 color themes), CHEERS/MISS feedback messages
     - **Confetti** component - particle burst animation
     - **Toast** component - feedback popup
     - **Bar** component - progress bar
     - **StageRead** - poem display with pinyin toggle, annotations, meaning, theme
     - **StageFill** - fill-in-the-blank with 4 options per question, shake animation on wrong
     - **StageQuiz** - multiple choice comprehension with ABCD labels, confetti on completion
     - **WritingCanvas** - Canvas component with:
       - Pointer events (pointerDown/Move/Up) for Apple Pencil
       - Touch events fallback
       - Pressure-sensitive brush rendering (lineWidth = brushSize * (0.3 + pressure * 1.4))
       - Quadratic bezier curves for smooth strokes
       - 米字格 background (dashed cross + diagonal lines)
       - 描红 mode: renders guide character in rgba(220, 60, 60, 0.15) using STKaiti/KaiTi font
       - Clear/redraw functionality
     - **StageWrite** - handwriting stage controller:
       - One char per screen flow
       - trace → write mode per character
       - Color palette: 6 colors (墨#1a1a1a, 灰#444, 朱#c0392b, 蓝#2980b9, 绿#27ae60, 紫#8e44ad)
       - Brush sizes: 4 (细), 8 (中), 14 (粗), 22 (特粗)
       - Dynamic canvas sizing (min of window width-48 and height-380, capped at 500)
       - Skip trace option
     - **StageDone** - completion screen with stars, score report, XP
     - **App** (main) - state management, flow: read → fill → quiz → write → done
       - Sticky header with back button and stage label
       - Home page: 关卡地图 with connecting lines, XP display

   - **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/src/App.jsx`** - Modified to:
     - Remove Poetry import, "古诗" nav button, Poetry render section, 'poetry' from paddingTop condition
     - Remove "选择" (quiz) and "填空" (fillblank) nav buttons from header

   - **`/Users/hong/english-input-app/.claude/launch.json`** - Added Poetry App configuration:
     ```json
     {
       "name": "Poetry App",
       "runtimeExecutable": "npm",
       "runtimeArgs": ["--prefix", "/Users/hong/poetry-app", "run", "dev", "--", "--port", "8767", "--host"],
       "port": 8767
     }
     ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **HEIC files too large to read**: Converted to JPG using `sips -s format jpeg -Z 1200`
   - **JSON parse error with Chinese curly quotes**: `""` (U+201C/U+201D) inside JSON string values broke the parser. Initially tried Python regex replacement but the issue was that some were actually ASCII `"` (U+0022) used as Chinese-style quotes within strings. Fixed by manually replacing each problematic line's `""` with `「」` corner brackets. Validated with `python3 -c "import json; json.load(...)"`
   - **Port 8766 already in use**: Chinese Art App was already configured on 8766 in launch.json. Changed poetry app to port 8767.
   - **User feedback: "没打开"**: Server was already running (curl returned 200), user just needed to refresh.
   - **User feedback: "我是要单独做个app"**: Had originally embedded poetry in english-input-app. User wanted a completely separate standalone app. Created new `/Users/hong/poetry-app/` project.
   - **User feedback: "移除input-English里的古诗模块"**: Removed Poetry import, nav button, render section from english-input-app.
   - **User feedback: "移除input-english里的填空按钮和选择按钮"**: Removed quiz and fillblank nav buttons from english-input-app header.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Extracted poem content from 5 textbook photos (HEIC format) - converted, read, transcribed
   - Designed Duolingo-style gamified UI with multi-stage learning flow
   - Built pressure-sensitive brush rendering for Apple Pencil using Canvas API + Pointer Events
   - Created dynamic canvas sizing for iPad responsiveness
   - Set up network-accessible server (0.0.0.0) so iPad can access via WiFi

```text
   204→  { unit: 6, label: 'L45', ids: [1009,1010,1011,1012,1013,1014] },
   205→  { unit: 6, label: 'L46', ids: [1015,1016,1017,1018,1019,1020] },
   206→  { unit: 6, label: 'L47', ids: [1021,1022,1023,1024,1025] },

   208→  { unit: 6, label: 'L49', ids: [1032,1033,1034,1035,1036] },
   209→  { unit: 6, label: 'L50', ids: [1037,1038,1039,1040,1041] },
   210→  { unit: 6, label: 'L51', ids: [1042,1043,1044,1045] },
   211→  { unit: 6, label: 'L52', ids: [1046,1047,1048,1049,1050] },
   212→]
   213→
   214→const idMap = Object.fromEntries(duolingoData.map(s => [s.id, s]))
   215→
   216→function getLessonData(ids) {
   217→  return ids.map(id => idMap[id]).filter(Boolean)
   218→}
   219→
   220→function getLessonStats(data, progress) {
   221→  const total = data.length
   222→  const attempted = data.filter(s => (progress[`sentence_${s.id}`]?.attempts || 0) > 0).length
   223→  const mastered = data.filter(s => progress[`sentence_${s.id}`]?.status === 'mastered').length
   224→  return { total, attempted, mastered }
   225→}
   226→
   227→function LessonStatusBadge({ attempted, mastered, total }) {
   228→  if (mastered === total && total > 0) return <span className="text-xs text-green-400 bg-green-900/40 border border-green-700/50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">已完成</span>
   229→  if (attempted > 0) return <span className="text-xs text-blue-400 bg-blue-900/40 border border-blue-700/50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">进行中</span>
   230→  return <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">待开始</span>
   231→}
   232→
   233→const UNIT_INFO = {
   234→  1: { name: 'Unit 1', desc: '入门：喜好、职业、问候', color: 'from-green-600 to-green-800', emoji: '🌱', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
   235→  2: { name: 'Unit 2', desc: '基础：日常、购物、天气', color: 'from-blue-600 to-blue-800', emoji: '📘', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
   236→  3: { name: 'Unit 3', desc: '进阶：旅行、比较、过去时', color: 'from-purple-600 to-purple-800', emoji: '🌍', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
   237→  4: { name: 'Unit 4', desc: '提高：购物、交通、职场', color: 'from-orange-600 to-orange-800', emoji: '🏙️', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
   238→  5: { name: 'Unit 5', desc: '流利：旅行、职场、社会话题', color: 'from-pink-600 to-pink-800', emoji: '🚀', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
   239→  6: { name: 'Unit 6', desc: '精通：情感、文化、复杂语法', color: 'from-red-600 to-red-800', emoji: '🎓', cover: '/duolingo.webp' },
   240→}
   241→
   242→export default function Courses({ onImport, changyongData, sampleData, onClose, onSetBack, progress = {} }) {
   243→  const [detail, setDetail] = useState(null) // null | 1 | 2
   244→
   245→  useEffect(() => {
   246→    onSetBack?.(detail ? () => () => setDetail(null) : null)
   247→  }, [detail, onSetBack])
   248→
   249→  if (detail !== null) {
   250→    const info = UNIT_INFO[detail]
   251→    const lessons = DUOLINGO_LESSONS.filter(l => l.unit === detail)
   252→    const allData = lessons.flatMap(l => getLessonData(l.ids))
   253→    const courseStats = getLessonStats(allData, progress)
   254→    const coursePercent = courseStats.total ? Math.round((courseStats.attempted / courseStats.total) * 100) : 0
   255→
   256→    return (
   257→      <div className="w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
   258→        <div className="bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-6 flex items-center gap-6">
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   280→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
   281→          {lessons.map((lesson, i) => {
   282→            const data = getLessonData(lesson.ids)
   283→            const stats = getLessonStats(data, progress)
   284→            const percent = stats.total ? Math.round((stats.attempted / stats.total) * 100) : 0
   285→            return (
   286→              <button
   287→                key={i}
   288→                onClick={() => onImport(data, `多邻国 ${info.name} · ${lesson.label}`)}
   289→                className="text-left bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-600 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 transition-colors"
   290→              >
   291→                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
   292→                  <span className="text-white text-sm font-medium">{lesson.label}</span>
   293→                  <LessonStatusBadge {...stats} />
   294→                </div>
   295→                <div className="w-full h-1 bg-gray-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   296→                  <div
   297→                    className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ${stats.mastered === stats.total && stats.total > 0 ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-blue-500'}`}
   298→                    style={{ width: `${percent}%` }}
   299→                  />
   300→                </div>
   301→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500">
   302→                  <span>{stats.attempted}/{stats.total} 句</span>
   303→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-mono">#{i + 1}</span>
   304→                </div>
   305→              </button>
   306→            )
   307→          })}
   308→        </div>
   309→      </div>
   310→    )
   311→  }
   312→
   313→  return (
   314→    <div className="w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-6">
   315→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   316→        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">课程广场</h2>
   317→        <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">多邻国课程</span>
   318→      </div>
   319→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    24→  if (!show) return null

    31→          width: 6 + Math.random() * 10, height: 6 + Math.random() * 10,
    32→          backgroundColor: colors[i % colors.length],

    38→}

    45→      ${ok ? 'bg-emerald-500 text-white' : 'bg-orange-500 text-white'}`}
    46→      style={{ transform: 'translateX(-50%)', animation: 'pop 0.35s ease-out' }}>
    47→      {msg}
    48→    </div>
    49→  )
    50→}
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-29 01:08:25Z)**_

已修复。主要改动：

1. **`min-h-screen` → `min-h-[100dvh]`**：使用 `dvh`（dynamic viewport height），在 iPad Safari 中正确计算全屏高度，包括地址栏收起时的空间
2. **`max-w-2xl`(672px) → `max-w-4xl`(896px)**：内容区宽度放大，iPad 11寸（820px宽）不再两边留大片空白
3. **画布上限 500px → 680px**：手写区在 iPad 上可以画得更大
4. **CSS `100dvh`**：body 和 #root 都用 `100dvh` 确保 Safari 全屏填满

iPad 上刷新 `http://192.168.100.36:8767` 查看效果。

 `/Users/hong/poetry-app/src/App.jsx`

```text
   140→
   141→// ================================
   142→//         填空 Stage
   143→// ================================
   144→function StageFill({ poem, theme, onNext }) {
   145→  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
   146→  const [sel, setSel] = useState(null)
   147→  const [ok, setOk] = useState(null)
   148→  const [toast, setToast] = useState(null)
   149→  const [score, setScore] = useState(0)
   150→  const [shake, setShake] = useState(false)
   151→
   152→  const items = poem.fillBlanks
   153→  const q = items[idx]
   154→
   155→  function select(opt) {
   156→    if (sel !== null) return
   157→    setSel(opt)
   158→    const correct = opt === q.answer
   159→    setOk(correct)
   160→    if (correct) { setScore(s => s + 1); setToast(pick(CHEERS)) }
   161→    else { setToast(pick(MISS)); setShake(true); setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500) }
   162→    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 1200)
   163→  }
   164→
   165→  function next() {
   166→    if (idx < items.length - 1) { setIdx(i => i + 1); setSel(null); setOk(null) }
   167→    else onNext(score)
   168→  }
   169→
   170→  return (
   171→    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-in">
   172→      <Toast msg={toast} ok={ok} show={!!toast} />
   173→      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   174→        <Bar n={idx + (sel !== null ? 1 : 0)} total={items.length} color={theme.btn} />
   175→        <span className="text-base text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{idx + 1}/{items.length}</span>
   176→      </div>
   177→
   178→      <div className="text-center">
   179→        <span className="text-4xl">✏️</span>
   180→        <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-2">填空练习</h3>
   181→        <p className="text-gray-500 text-lg">选择正确的字填入空白处</p>
   182→      </div>
   183→
   184→      <div className={`bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-8 text-center transition-all
   185→        ${shake ? 'shake border-red-500' : ok ? theme.ring : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
   186→        <p className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif tracking-[0.2em] text-white">
   187→          {q.text.replace('___', sel !== null ? (ok ? `【${q.answer}】` : `【${sel}→${q.answer}】`) : '＿＿')}
   188→        </p>
   189→      </div>
   190→
   191→      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   192→        {q.options.map((opt, i) => {
   193→          let cls = 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white'
   194→          if (sel !== null) {
   195→            if (opt === q.answer) cls = 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white scale-105'
   196→            else if (opt === sel && !ok) cls = 'bg-red-600/50 border-red-500 text-white'
   197→            else cls = 'bg-gray-800/40 border-gray-800 text-gray-600'
   198→          }
   199→          return (
   200→            <button key={i} onClick={() => select(opt)} disabled={sel !== null}
   201→              className={`py-5 rounded-2xl border-2 text-2xl font-bold transition-all duration-200 ${cls}`}>
   202→              {opt}
   203→            </button>
   204→          )
   205→        })}
   206→      </div>
   207→
   208→      {sel !== null && (
   209→        <button onClick={next}
   210→          className={`w-full py-5 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} ${theme.btnH} text-white text-xl font-bold shadow-xl transition-all animate-in`}>
   211→          {idx < items.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '进入理解题 →'}
   212→        </button>
   213→      )}
   214→    </div>
   215→  )
   216→}
   217→
   218→// ================================
   219→//         选择题 Stage
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   218→// ================================
   219→//         选择题 Stage
   220→// ================================
   221→function StageQuiz({ poem, theme, onComplete }) {
   222→  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
   223→  const [sel, setSel] = useState(null)
   224→  const [ok, setOk] = useState(null)
   225→  const [toast, setToast] = useState(null)
   226→  const [score, setScore] = useState(0)
   227→  const [shake, setShake] = useState(false)
   228→  const [confetti, setConfetti] = useState(false)
   229→
   230→  const qs = poem.quiz
   231→  const q = qs[idx]
   232→  const labels = ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D']
   233→
   234→  function select(i) {
   235→    if (sel !== null) return
   236→    setSel(i)
   237→    const correct = i === q.answer
   238→    setOk(correct)
   239→    if (correct) { setScore(s => s + 1); setToast(pick(CHEERS)) }
   240→    else { setToast(pick(MISS)); setShake(true); setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500) }
   241→    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 1200)
   242→  }
   243→
   244→  function next() {
   245→    if (idx < qs.length - 1) { setIdx(i => i + 1); setSel(null); setOk(null) }
   246→    else { setConfetti(true); setTimeout(() => onComplete(score + (ok ? 1 : 0)), 1500) }
   247→  }
   248→
   249→  return (
   250→    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 animate-in">
   251→      <Confetti show={confetti} />
   252→      <Toast msg={toast} ok={ok} show={!!toast} />
   253→
   254→      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   255→        <Bar n={idx + (sel !== null ? 1 : 0)} total={qs.length} color={theme.btn} />
   256→        <span className="text-base text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{idx + 1}/{qs.length}</span>
   257→      </div>
   258→
   259→      <div className="text-center">
   260→        <span className="text-4xl">🧠</span>
   261→        <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-2">理解练习</h3>
   262→        <p className="text-gray-500 text-lg">选择正确的答案</p>
   263→      </div>
   264→
   265→      <div className={`bg-gray-900 border-2 rounded-3xl p-6 transition-all
   266→        ${shake ? 'shake border-red-500' : 'border-gray-800'}`}>
   267→        <p className="text-xl text-white font-medium leading-relaxed">{q.question}</p>
   268→      </div>
   269→
   270→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
   271→        {q.options.map((opt, i) => {
   272→          let cls = 'bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white'
   273→          if (sel !== null) {
   274→            if (i === q.answer) cls = 'bg-emerald-600 border-emerald-400 text-white'
   275→            else if (i === sel && !ok) cls = 'bg-red-600/50 border-red-500 text-white'
   276→            else cls = 'bg-gray-800/40 border-gray-800 text-gray-600'
   277→          }
   278→          return (
   279→            <button key={i} onClick={() => select(i)} disabled={sel !== null}
   280→              className={`w-full py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left text-lg font-medium transition-all flex items-center gap-4 ${cls}`}>
   281→              <span className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-black/20 flex items-center justify-center text-base font-bold shrink-0">{labels[i]}</span>
   282→              {opt}
   283→            </button>
   284→          )
   285→        })}
   286→      </div>
   287→
   288→      {sel !== null && !confetti && (
   289→        <button onClick={next}
   290→          className={`w-full py-5 rounded-2xl ${theme.btn} ${theme.btnH} text-white text-xl font-bold shadow-xl transition-all animate-in`}>
   291→          {idx < qs.length - 1 ? '下一题 →' : '完成！🎉'}
   292→        </button>
   293→      )}
   294→    </div>
   295→  )
   296→}
   297→
```

```text
    76→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{poem.title}</h2>

    80→          {poem.lines.map((line, i) => (
    81→            <div key={i} className="mb-4 text-center">
    82→              {pinyin && <div className="text-sm text-white/40 tracking-wider mb-1">{poem.pinyin[i]}</div>}
    83→              <div className="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-white font-serif tracking-[0.3em]">{line}</div>
    84→            </div>
    85→          ))}
    86→        </div>
    87→        <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mt-5">
    88→          <button onClick={() => setPinyin(v => !v)}
    89→            className={`px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-base font-medium transition-all ${pinyin ? 'bg-white/30 text-white' : 'bg-white/10 text-white/50'}`}>
    90→            {pinyin ? '隐藏拼音' : '显示拼音'}

    92→          <button onClick={() => setAnno(v => !v)}
    93→            className={`px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-base font-medium transition-all ${anno ? 'bg-white/30 text-white' : 'bg-white/10 text-white/50'}`}>
    94→            {anno ? '收起注释' : '查看注释'}
    95→          </button>
    96→        </div>
    97→      </div>
    98→
    99→      {/* 注释 */}
   100→      {anno && (
```

```text
   680→    const p = { ...progress }
   681→    const key = `poem_${poemId}`
   682→    const prev = p[key] || { stars: 0, bestPct: 0, attempts: 0 }
   683→    const totalQ = poem.fillBlanks.length + poem.quiz.length
   684→    const total = fillScore + qScore
   685→    const pct = Math.round((total / totalQ) * 100)
   686→    const stars = pct >= 90 ? 3 : pct >= 60 ? 2 : 1
   687→    p[key] = { stars: Math.max(prev.stars, stars), bestPct: Math.max(prev.bestPct, pct), attempts: (prev.attempts || 0) + 1 }
```
