- ANY modifier released
- flagsChanged misfires
- control/option state changes unexpectedly

STEP 2. Improve hotkey logic
Instead of ending recording on any flagsChanged event,
only stop when BOTH required modifiers are released.

Pseudo logic:

required = [.control, .option]

if currentFlags contains required:
    if not recording:
        startRecording()
else:
    if recording:
        stopRecording()

Debounce state changes by 100ms to avoid transient interruptions.

STEP 3. Add debug logging

current modifier flags

Clicky

STEP 5. Add alternate hotkey setting

F8
or Command + Shift

Ensure compiled Clicky uses stable:
CFBundleIdentifier
CFBundleName

No duplicate helper targets with conflicting names.

STEP 7. Microphone validation
Ensure stopRecording() is not triggered by audio session failure.

permission denial
engine interruption

global shortcut event conflict, not recording engine failure.

```text
135	        case .keyDown:

157	    private static func shortcutTransition(
158	        for shortcutEventType: ShortcutEventType,
159	        keyCode: UInt16,
160	        modifierFlags: NSEvent.ModifierFlags,
161	        wasShortcutPreviouslyPressed: Bool
162	    ) -> ShortcutTransition {
163	        if let modifierOnlyFlags = currentShortcutOption.modifierOnlyFlags {
164	            guard shortcutEventType == .flagsChanged else { return .none }
165	
166	            let isShortcutCurrentlyPressed = modifierFlags.contains(modifierOnlyFlags)
167	
168	            if isShortcutCurrentlyPressed && !wasShortcutPreviouslyPressed {
169	                return .pressed
170	            }
171	
172	            if !isShortcutCurrentlyPressed && wasShortcutPreviouslyPressed {
173	                return .released
174	            }
175	
176	            return .none
177	        }
178	
179	        guard let pushToTalkModifierFlags = currentShortcutOption.spaceShortcutModifierFlags else {
180	            return .none
181	        }
182	
183	        let matchesModifierFlags = modifierFlags.isSuperset(of: pushToTalkModifierFlags)
184	
185	        if shortcutEventType == .keyDown
186	            && keyCode == pushToTalkKeyCode
187	            && matchesModifierFlags
188	            && !wasShortcutPreviouslyPressed {
189	            return .pressed
190	        }
191	
192	        if shortcutEventType == .keyUp
193	            && keyCode == pushToTalkKeyCode
194	            && wasShortcutPreviouslyPressed {
195	            return .released
196	        }
197	
198	        return .none
199	    }

335	        guard isDictationInProgress else { return }
336	
337	        finalizeFallbackWorkItem?.cancel()
338	        finalizeFallbackWorkItem = nil
339	
340	        if preserveDraftText {
341	            let currentDraftText = composeDraftText(withTranscribedText: latestRecognizedText)
342	            draftCallbacks?.updateDraftText(currentDraftText)
343	        }
344	
345	        audioEngine.stop()
346	        audioEngine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
347	        activeTranscriptionSession?.cancel()
348	
349	        resetSessionState()
350	    }
351	
352	    func requestInitialPushToTalkPermissionsIfNeeded() async {
353	        guard needsInitialPermissionPrompt else { return }
354	        guard !isDictationInProgress else { return }
355	
356	        lastErrorMessage = nil
357	        currentPermissionProblem = nil
358	        isPreparingToRecord = true
359	
360	        NSApplication.shared.activate(ignoringOtherApps: true)
361	
362	        do {
363	            try await Task.sleep(for: .milliseconds(200))
364	        } catch {
365	            // If the task is cancelled while we are waiting for macOS to bring
366	            // the app forward, we can safely continue into the permission check.
367	        }
368	
369	        let hasPermissions = await requestMicrophoneAndSpeechPermissionsWithoutDuplicatePrompts()
370	        isPreparingToRecord = false
371	
372	        if hasPermissions {
373	            lastErrorMessage = nil
374	        }
375	    }
376	
377	    private func startPushToTalk(
378	        startSource: BuddyDictationStartSource,
379	        currentDraftText: String,
380	        updateDraftText: @escaping (String) -> Void,
381	        submitDraftText: @escaping (String) -> Void,
382	        shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraftOnStop: Bool
383	    ) async {
384	        guard !isDictationInProgress else { return }
385	
386	        print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: start requested (\(startSource))")
387	
388	        if needsInitialPermissionPrompt {
389	            print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: requesting initial permissions")
390	            NSApplication.shared.activate(ignoringOtherApps: true)
391	
392	            do {
393	                try await Task.sleep(for: .milliseconds(200))
394	            } catch {
395	                // If the task is cancelled while the app is being activated,
396	                // we can safely continue into the permission request.
397	            }
398	        }
399	
400	        let startRequestIdentifier = UUID()
401	        pendingStartRequestIdentifier = startRequestIdentifier
402	
403	        lastErrorMessage = nil
404	        currentPermissionProblem = nil
405	        isPreparingToRecord = true
406	
407	        guard await requestMicrophoneAndSpeechPermissionsWithoutDuplicatePrompts() else {
408	            print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: permissions missing or denied")
409	            isPreparingToRecord = false
410	            return
411	        }
412	        guard !Task.isCancelled else {
413	            print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: start cancelled (shortcut released during permission check)")
414	            isPreparingToRecord = false
415	            return
416	        }
417	        guard pendingStartRequestIdentifier == startRequestIdentifier else {
418	            print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: start request superseded")
419	            isPreparingToRecord = false
420	            return
421	        }
422	
423	        draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation = currentDraftText
424	        latestRecognizedText = ""
425	        draftCallbacks = BuddyDictationDraftCallbacks(
426	            updateDraftText: updateDraftText,
427	            submitDraftText: submitDraftText
428	        )
429	        activeStartSource = startSource
430	        shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraft = shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraftOnStop
431	        hasFinishedCurrentDictationSession = false
432	        isFinalizingTranscript = false
433	        isRecordingFromMicrophoneButton = startSource == .microphoneButton
434	        isRecordingFromKeyboardShortcut = startSource == .keyboardShortcut
435	        isKeyboardShortcutSessionActiveOrFinalizing = startSource == .keyboardShortcut
436	        currentAudioPowerLevel = 0
437	        recordedAudioPowerHistory = Array(
438	            repeating: Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryBaselineLevel,
439	            count: Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryLength
440	        )
441	        microphoneButtonRecordingStartedAt = nil
442	        lastRecordedAudioPowerSampleDate = .distantPast
443	
444	        guard !Task.isCancelled else {
445	            print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: start cancelled (shortcut released before recording began)")
446	            resetSessionState()
447	            return
448	        }
449	
450	        do {
451	            try await startRecognitionSession()
452	            guard !Task.isCancelled else {
453	                print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: start cancelled (shortcut released during session start)")
454	                audioEngine.stop()
455	                audioEngine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
456	                activeTranscriptionSession?.cancel()
457	                resetSessionState()
458	                return
459	            }
460	            if startSource == .microphoneButton {
461	                microphoneButtonRecordingStartedAt = Date()
462	            }
463	            isPreparingToRecord = false
464	            print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: recognition session started")
465	        } catch {
466	            isPreparingToRecord = false
467	            lastErrorMessage = userFacingErrorMessage(
468	                from: error,
469	                fallback: "couldn't start voice input. try again."
470	            )
471	            print("❌ BuddyDictationManager: failed to start recognition session (\(transcriptionProvider.displayName)): \(error)")
472	            resetSessionState()
473	        }
474	    }
475	
476	    private func stopPushToTalk(expectedStartSource: BuddyDictationStartSource) {
477	        pendingStartRequestIdentifier = UUID()
478	
479	        guard activeStartSource == expectedStartSource else {
480	            isPreparingToRecord = false
481	            return
482	        }
483	        guard !isFinalizingTranscript else { return }
484	
485	        print("🎙️ BuddyDictationManager: stop requested (\(expectedStartSource))")
486	
487	        isRecordingFromMicrophoneButton = false
488	        isRecordingFromKeyboardShortcut = false
489	        isFinalizingTranscript = true
490	
491	        let finalTranscriptFallbackDelaySeconds = activeTranscriptionSession?.finalTranscriptFallbackDelaySeconds
492	            ?? Self.defaultFinalTranscriptFallbackDelaySeconds
493	
494	        audioEngine.stop()
495	        audioEngine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
496	        activeTranscriptionSession?.requestFinalTranscript()
497	
498	        finalizeFallbackWorkItem?.cancel()
499	        let shouldSubmitFinalDraftWhenFallbackTriggers = shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraft
500	        let fallbackWorkItem = DispatchWorkItem { [weak self] in
501	            Task { @MainActor in
502	                self?.finishCurrentDictationSessionIfNeeded(
503	                    shouldSubmitFinalDraft: shouldSubmitFinalDraftWhenFallbackTriggers
504	                )
505	            }
506	        }
507	        finalizeFallbackWorkItem = fallbackWorkItem
508	        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(
509	            deadline: .now() + finalTranscriptFallbackDelaySeconds,
510	            execute: fallbackWorkItem
511	        )
512	    }
513	
514	    private func startRecognitionSession() async throws {
515	        activeTranscriptionSession?.cancel()
516	        activeTranscriptionSession = nil
517	
518	        NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] startRecognitionSession — provider=\(transcriptionProvider.displayName)")
519	
520	        let activeTranscriptionSession = try await transcriptionProvider.startStreamingSession(
521	            keyterms: buildTranscriptionKeyterms(),
522	            onTranscriptUpdate: { [weak self] transcriptText in
523	                Task { @MainActor in
524	                    self?.latestRecognizedText = transcriptText
525	                }
526	            },
527	            onFinalTranscriptReady: { [weak self] transcriptText in
528	                Task { @MainActor in
529	                    guard let self else { return }
530	                    self.latestRecognizedText = transcriptText
531	
532	                    if self.isFinalizingTranscript {
533	                        self.finishCurrentDictationSessionIfNeeded(
534	                            shouldSubmitFinalDraft: self.shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraft
535	                        )
536	                    }
537	                }
538	            },
539	            onError: { [weak self] error in
540	                Task { @MainActor in
541	                    self?.handleRecognitionError(error)
542	                }
543	            }
544	        )
545	
546	        self.activeTranscriptionSession = activeTranscriptionSession
547	        NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] provider ready, starting audio engine")
548	
549	        let inputNode = audioEngine.inputNode
550	        let inputFormat = inputNode.outputFormat(forBus: 0)
551	        NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] inputFormat sampleRate=\(inputFormat.sampleRate) channels=\(inputFormat.channelCount)")
552	
553	        inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
554	        inputNode.installTap(onBus: 0, bufferSize: 1024, format: inputFormat) { [weak self] buffer, _ in
555	            self?.activeTranscriptionSession?.appendAudioBuffer(buffer)
556	            self?.updateAudioPowerLevel(from: buffer)
557	        }
558	
559	        // Reset the engine to a clean state before each session.
560	        // Without this, AVAudioEngine fails silently on the second start
561	        // after being stopped by the previous session.
562	        audioEngine.reset()
563	        audioEngine.prepare()
564	        do {
565	            try audioEngine.start()
566	            NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] audioEngine.start() succeeded, isRunning=\(audioEngine.isRunning)")
567	        } catch {
568	            NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] audioEngine.start() THREW: \(error)")
569	            throw error
570	        }
571	    }
572	
573	    private func handleRecognitionError(_ error: Error) {
574	        let nsError = error as NSError
575	        NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] handleRecognitionError — domain=\(nsError.domain) code=\(nsError.code) desc=\(nsError.localizedDescription)")
576	
577	        if hasFinishedCurrentDictationSession {
578	            NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] handleRecognitionError — ignored, session already finished")
579	            return
580	        }
581	
582	        if isFinalizingTranscript && !latestRecognizedText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty {
583	            finishCurrentDictationSessionIfNeeded(
584	                shouldSubmitFinalDraft: shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraft
585	            )
586	        } else {
587	            NSLog("❌ Buddy dictation error (\(transcriptionProvider.displayName)): \(error)")
588	            lastErrorMessage = userFacingErrorMessage(
589	                from: error,
590	                fallback: "couldn't transcribe that. try again."
591	            )
592	            cancelCurrentDictation(preserveDraftText: false)
593	        }
594	    }
595	
596	    private func finishCurrentDictationSessionIfNeeded(shouldSubmitFinalDraft: Bool) {
597	        guard !hasFinishedCurrentDictationSession else { return }
598	        hasFinishedCurrentDictationSession = true
599	
600	        finalizeFallbackWorkItem?.cancel()
601	        finalizeFallbackWorkItem = nil
602	
603	        let finalDraftText = composeDraftText(withTranscribedText: latestRecognizedText)
604	        let finalTranscriptText = latestRecognizedText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
605	        let currentDraftCallbacks = draftCallbacks
606	
607	        if !shouldSubmitFinalDraft && !finalDraftText.isEmpty {
608	            currentDraftCallbacks?.updateDraftText(finalDraftText)
609	        }
610	
611	        audioEngine.stop()
612	        audioEngine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
613	        activeTranscriptionSession?.cancel()
614	
615	        resetSessionState()
616	
617	        guard shouldSubmitFinalDraft else { return }
618	        guard !finalTranscriptText.isEmpty else { return }
619	
620	        currentDraftCallbacks?.submitDraftText(finalDraftText)
621	    }
622	
623	    private func composeDraftText(withTranscribedText transcribedText: String) -> String {
624	        let trimmedTranscriptText = transcribedText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
625	
626	        guard !trimmedTranscriptText.isEmpty else {
627	            return draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation
628	        }
629	
630	        let trimmedExistingDraftText = draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation
631	            .trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
632	
633	        guard !trimmedExistingDraftText.isEmpty else {
634	            return trimmedTranscriptText
635	        }
636	
637	        if draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation.hasSuffix(" ") || draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation.hasSuffix("\n") {
638	            return draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation + trimmedTranscriptText
639	        }
640	
641	        return draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation + " " + trimmedTranscriptText
642	    }
643	
644	    private func resetSessionState() {
645	        pendingStartRequestIdentifier = UUID()
646	        activeTranscriptionSession = nil
647	        draftCallbacks = nil
648	        activeStartSource = nil
649	        draftTextBeforeCurrentDictation = ""
650	        latestRecognizedText = ""
651	        shouldAutomaticallySubmitFinalDraft = false
652	        hasFinishedCurrentDictationSession = false
653	        isPreparingToRecord = false
654	        isRecordingFromMicrophoneButton = false
655	        isRecordingFromKeyboardShortcut = false
656	        isKeyboardShortcutSessionActiveOrFinalizing = false
657	        isFinalizingTranscript = false
658	        currentAudioPowerLevel = 0
659	        recordedAudioPowerHistory = Array(
660	            repeating: Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryBaselineLevel,
661	            count: Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryLength
662	        )
663	        microphoneButtonRecordingStartedAt = nil
664	        lastRecordedAudioPowerSampleDate = .distantPast
665	    }
666	
667	    private func buildTranscriptionKeyterms() -> [String] {
668	        let baseKeyterms = [
669	            "makesomething",
670	            "Learning Buddy",
671	            "Codex",
672	            "Claude",
673	            "Anthropic",
674	            "OpenAI",
675	            "SwiftUI",
676	            "Xcode",
677	            "Vercel",
678	            "Next.js",
679	            "localhost"
680	        ]
681	
682	        let combinedKeyterms = baseKeyterms + contextualKeyterms
683	        var uniqueNormalizedKeyterms = Set<String>()
684	        var orderedKeyterms: [String] = []
685	
686	        for keyterm in combinedKeyterms {
687	            let trimmedKeyterm = keyterm.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
688	            guard !trimmedKeyterm.isEmpty else { continue }
689	
690	            let normalizedKeyterm = trimmedKeyterm.lowercased()
691	            if uniqueNormalizedKeyterms.contains(normalizedKeyterm) {
692	                continue
693	            }
694	
695	            uniqueNormalizedKeyterms.insert(normalizedKeyterm)
696	            orderedKeyterms.append(trimmedKeyterm)
697	        }
698	
699	        return orderedKeyterms
700	    }
701	
702	    private func updateAudioPowerLevel(from audioBuffer: AVAudioPCMBuffer) {
703	        guard let channelData = audioBuffer.floatChannelData else { return }
704	
705	        let channelSamples = channelData[0]
706	        let frameCount = Int(audioBuffer.frameLength)
707	        guard frameCount > 0 else { return }
708	
709	        var summedSquares: Float = 0
710	        for sampleIndex in 0..<frameCount {
711	            let sample = channelSamples[sampleIndex]
712	            summedSquares += sample * sample
713	        }
714	
715	        let rootMeanSquare = sqrt(summedSquares / Float(frameCount))
716	        let boostedLevel = min(max(rootMeanSquare * 10.2, 0), 1)
717	
718	        DispatchQueue.main.async { [weak self] in
719	            guard let self else { return }
720	
721	            let smoothedAudioPowerLevel = max(
722	                CGFloat(boostedLevel),
723	                self.currentAudioPowerLevel * 0.72
724	            )
725	            self.currentAudioPowerLevel = smoothedAudioPowerLevel
726	
727	            let now = Date()
728	            if now.timeIntervalSince(self.lastRecordedAudioPowerSampleDate)
729	                >= Self.recordedAudioPowerHistorySampleIntervalSeconds {
730	                self.lastRecordedAudioPowerSampleDate = now
731	                self.appendRecordedAudioPowerSample(
732	                    max(CGFloat(boostedLevel), Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryBaselineLevel)
733	                )
734	            }
735	        }
736	    }
737	
738	    private func appendRecordedAudioPowerSample(_ audioPowerSample: CGFloat) {
739	        var updatedRecordedAudioPowerHistory = recordedAudioPowerHistory
740	        updatedRecordedAudioPowerHistory.append(audioPowerSample)
741	
742	        if updatedRecordedAudioPowerHistory.count > Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryLength {
743	            updatedRecordedAudioPowerHistory.removeFirst(
744	                updatedRecordedAudioPowerHistory.count - Self.recordedAudioPowerHistoryLength
745	            )
746	        }
747	
748	        recordedAudioPowerHistory = updatedRecordedAudioPowerHistory
749	    }
750	
751	    private func requestMicrophoneAndSpeechPermissionsIfNeeded() async -> Bool {
752	        let hasMicrophonePermission = await requestMicrophonePermissionIfNeeded()
753	        guard hasMicrophonePermission else {
754	            lastErrorMessage = "microphone permission is required for push to talk."
755	            return false
756	        }
757	
758	        guard transcriptionProvider.requiresSpeechRecognitionPermission else {
759	            return true
760	        }
761	
762	        let hasSpeechRecognitionPermission = await requestSpeechRecognitionPermissionIfNeeded()
763	        guard hasSpeechRecognitionPermission else {
764	            lastErrorMessage = "speech recognition permission is required for push to talk."
765	            return false
766	        }
767	
768	        return true
769	    }
770	
771	    /// macOS can show the microphone/speech sheet again if we accidentally fan out
772	    /// multiple permission requests before the first one finishes. We keep exactly
773	    /// one in-flight request task so rapid repeat presses all await the same result.
774	    ///
775	    /// After the task completes, we skip re-requesting for a short cooldown period
776	    /// so macOS has time to update its authorization cache. This prevents the
777	    /// permission dialog from popping up again on rapid follow-up presses.
778	    private func requestMicrophoneAndSpeechPermissionsWithoutDuplicatePrompts() async -> Bool {
779	        // If a permission request is already in-flight, reuse it.
780	        if let activePermissionRequestTask {
781	            return await activePermissionRequestTask.value
782	        }
783	
784	        // If we just finished a permission request very recently, skip re-requesting.
785	        // macOS can briefly report .notDetermined even after the user tapped Allow,
786	        // so we trust the cached result for a short window.
787	        if let lastPermissionRequestCompletedAt,
788	           Date().timeIntervalSince(lastPermissionRequestCompletedAt) < 1.0 {
789	            return AVCaptureDevice.authorizationStatus(for: .audio) != .denied
790	                && AVCaptureDevice.authorizationStatus(for: .audio) != .restricted
791	        }
792	
793	        let permissionRequestTask = Task { @MainActor in
794	            await self.requestMicrophoneAndSpeechPermissionsIfNeeded()
795	        }
796	
797	        activePermissionRequestTask = permissionRequestTask
798	
799	        let hasPermissions = await permissionRequestTask.value
800	        activePermissionRequestTask = nil
801	        lastPermissionRequestCompletedAt = Date()
802	        return hasPermissions
803	    }
804	
805	    private func requestMicrophonePermissionIfNeeded() async -> Bool {
806	        switch AVCaptureDevice.authorizationStatus(for: .audio) {
807	        case .authorized:
808	            currentPermissionProblem = nil
809	            return true
810	        case .notDetermined:
811	            let isGranted = await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
812	                AVCaptureDevice.requestAccess(for: .audio) { isGranted in
813	                    continuation.resume(returning: isGranted)
814	                }
815	            }
816	            currentPermissionProblem = isGranted ? nil : .microphoneAccessDenied
817	            return isGranted
818	        case .denied, .restricted:
819	            currentPermissionProblem = .microphoneAccessDenied
820	            return false
821	        @unknown default:
822	            currentPermissionProblem = .microphoneAccessDenied
823	            return false
824	        }
825	    }
826	
827	    private func requestSpeechRecognitionPermissionIfNeeded() async -> Bool {
828	        let status = SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus()
829	        NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] requestSpeechRecognitionPermissionIfNeeded — current status=\(status.rawValue)")
830	        switch status {
831	        case .authorized:
832	            currentPermissionProblem = nil
833	            return true
834	        case .notDetermined:
835	            NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] prompting for speech recognition permission…")
836	            let isGranted = await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
837	                SFSpeechRecognizer.requestAuthorization { authorizationStatus in
838	                    NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] speech recognition auth result = \(authorizationStatus.rawValue)")
839	                    continuation.resume(returning: authorizationStatus == .authorized)
840	                }
841	            }
842	            currentPermissionProblem = isGranted ? nil : .speechRecognitionDenied
843	            return isGranted
844	        case .denied, .restricted:
845	            NSLog("🎙️ [DEBUG] speech recognition DENIED or RESTRICTED")
846	            currentPermissionProblem = .speechRecognitionDenied
847	            return false
848	        @unknown default:
849	            currentPermissionProblem = .speechRecognitionDenied
850	            return false
851	        }
852	    }
853	
854	    func openRelevantPrivacySettings() {
855	        let settingsURLString: String
856	
857	        switch currentPermissionProblem {
858	        case .microphoneAccessDenied:
859	            settingsURLString = "x-apple.systempreferences:com.apple.preference.security?Privacy_Microphone"
860	        case .speechRecognitionDenied:
861	            settingsURLString = "x-apple.systempreferences:com.apple.preference.security?Privacy_SpeechRecognition"
862	        case nil:
863	            settingsURLString = "x-apple.systempreferences:com.apple.preference.security"
864	        }
865	
866	        guard let settingsURL = URL(string: settingsURLString) else { return }
867	        NSWorkspace.shared.open(settingsURL)
868	    }
869	
870	    private func userFacingErrorMessage(from error: Error, fallback: String) -> String {
871	        if let localizedError = error as? LocalizedError,
872	           let errorDescription = localizedError.errorDescription?
873	            .trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines),
874	           !errorDescription.isEmpty {
875	            return errorDescription
876	        }
877	
878	        let errorDescription = error.localizedDescription.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
879	        if !errorDescription.isEmpty,
880	           errorDescription != "The operation couldn’t be completed." {
881	            return errorDescription
882	        }
883	
884	        return fallback
885	    }
886	}
887
```

 `/Users/hong/clicky-src/leanring-buddy/GlobalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor.swift`

```text
1	//
2	//  GlobalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor.swift
3	//  leanring-buddy
4	//
5	//  Captures push-to-talk keyboard shortcuts while makesomething is running in the
6	//  background. Uses a listen-only CGEvent tap so modifier-only shortcuts like
7	//  ctrl + option behave more like a real system-wide voice tool.
8	//
9	
10	import AppKit
11	import Combine
12	import CoreGraphics
13	import Foundation
14	
15	final class GlobalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor: ObservableObject {
16	    let shortcutTransitionPublisher = PassthroughSubject<BuddyPushToTalkShortcut.ShortcutTransition, Never>()
17	
18	    private var globalEventTap: CFMachPort?
19	    private var globalEventTapRunLoopSource: CFRunLoopSource?
20	    /// Mutated exclusively from the CGEvent tap callback, which runs on
21	    /// `CFRunLoopGetMain()` and therefore always executes on the main thread.
22	    /// Published so the overlay can hide immediately on key release without
23	    /// waiting for the async dictation state pipeline to catch up.
24	    @Published private(set) var isShortcutCurrentlyPressed = false
25	
26	    deinit {
27	        stop()
28	    }
29	
30	    func start() {
31	        // If the event tap is already running, don't restart it.
32	        // Restarting resets isShortcutCurrentlyPressed, which would kill
33	        // the waveform overlay mid-press when the permission poller calls
34	        // refreshAllPermissions → start() every few seconds.
35	        guard globalEventTap == nil else { return }
36	
37	        let monitoredEventTypes: [CGEventType] = [.flagsChanged, .keyDown, .keyUp]
38	        let eventMask = monitoredEventTypes.reduce(CGEventMask(0)) { currentMask, eventType in
39	            currentMask | (CGEventMask(1) << eventType.rawValue)
40	        }
41	
42	        let eventTapCallback: CGEventTapCallBack = { _, eventType, event, userInfo in
43	            guard let userInfo else {
44	                return Unmanaged.passUnretained(event)
45	            }
46	
47	            let globalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor = Unmanaged<GlobalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor>
48	                .fromOpaque(userInfo)
49	                .takeUnretainedValue()
50	
51	            return globalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor.handleGlobalEventTap(
52	                eventType: eventType,
53	                event: event
54	            )
55	        }
56	
57	        guard let globalEventTap = CGEvent.tapCreate(
58	            tap: .cgSessionEventTap,
59	            place: .headInsertEventTap,
60	            options: .listenOnly,
61	            eventsOfInterest: eventMask,
62	            callback: eventTapCallback,
63	            userInfo: Unmanaged.passUnretained(self).toOpaque()
64	        ) else {
65	            print("⚠️ Global push-to-talk: couldn't create CGEvent tap")
66	            return
67	        }
68	
69	        guard let globalEventTapRunLoopSource = CFMachPortCreateRunLoopSource(
70	            kCFAllocatorDefault,
71	            globalEventTap,
72	            0
73	        ) else {
74	            CFMachPortInvalidate(globalEventTap)
75	            print("⚠️ Global push-to-talk: couldn't create event tap run loop source")
76	            return
77	        }
78	
79	        self.globalEventTap = globalEventTap
80	        self.globalEventTapRunLoopSource = globalEventTapRunLoopSource
81

83	        CGEvent.tapEnable(tap: globalEventTap, enable: true)
84	    }
85	
86	    func stop() {
87	        isShortcutCurrentlyPressed = false
88	
89	        if let globalEventTapRunLoopSource {
90	            CFRunLoopRemoveSource(CFRunLoopGetMain(), globalEventTapRunLoopSource, .commonModes)
91	            self.globalEventTapRunLoopSource = nil
92	        }
93	
94	        if let globalEventTap {
95	            CFMachPortInvalidate(globalEventTap)
96	            self.globalEventTap = nil
97	        }
98	    }
99	
100	    private func handleGlobalEventTap(
101	        eventType: CGEventType,
102	        event: CGEvent
103	    ) -> Unmanaged<CGEvent>? {
104	        if eventType == .tapDisabledByTimeout || eventType == .tapDisabledByUserInput {
105	            if let globalEventTap {
106	                CGEvent.tapEnable(tap: globalEventTap, enable: true)
107	            }
108	            return Unmanaged.passUnretained(event)
109	        }
110	
111	        let eventKeyCode = UInt16(event.getIntegerValueField(.keyboardEventKeycode))
112	        let shortcutTransition = BuddyPushToTalkShortcut.shortcutTransition(
113	            for: eventType,
114	            keyCode: eventKeyCode,
115	            modifierFlagsRawValue: event.flags.rawValue,
116	            wasShortcutPreviouslyPressed: isShortcutCurrentlyPressed
117	        )
118	
119	        switch shortcutTransition {
120	        case .none:
121	            break
122	        case .pressed:
123	            isShortcutCurrentlyPressed = true
124	            shortcutTransitionPublisher.send(.pressed)
125	        case .released:
126	            isShortcutCurrentlyPressed = false
127	            shortcutTransitionPublisher.send(.released)
128	        }
129	
130	        return Unmanaged.passUnretained(event)
131	    }
132	}
133
```

```text
462	
463	    private func bindShortcutTransitions() {
464	        shortcutTransitionCancellable = globalPushToTalkShortcutMonitor
465	            .shortcutTransitionPublisher
466	            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
467	            .sink { [weak self] transition in
468	                self?.handleShortcutTransition(transition)
469	            }
470	    }
471	
472	    private func handleShortcutTransition(_ transition: BuddyPushToTalkShortcut.ShortcutTransition) {
473	        switch transition {
474	        case .pressed:
475	            guard !buddyDictationManager.isDictationInProgress else { return }
476	            // Don't register push-to-talk while the onboarding video is playing
477	            guard !showOnboardingVideo else { return }
478	
479	            // Cancel any pending transient hide so the overlay stays visible
480	            transientHideTask?.cancel()
481	            transientHideTask = nil
482	
483	            // If the cursor is hidden, bring it back transiently for this interaction
484	            if !isClickyCursorEnabled && !isOverlayVisible {
485	                overlayWindowManager.hasShownOverlayBefore = true
486	                overlayWindowManager.showOverlay(onScreens: NSScreen.screens, companionManager: self)
487	                isOverlayVisible = true
488	            }
489	
490	            // Dismiss the menu bar panel so it doesn't cover the screen
491	            NotificationCenter.default.post(name: .clickyDismissPanel, object: nil)
492	
493	            // Cancel any in-progress response and TTS from a previous utterance
494	            currentResponseTask?.cancel()
495	            elevenLabsTTSClient.stopPlayback()
496	            clearDetectedElementLocation()
497	
498	            // Dismiss the onboarding prompt if it's showing
499	            if showOnboardingPrompt {
500	                withAnimation(.easeOut(duration: 0.3)) {
501	                    onboardingPromptOpacity = 0.0
502	                }
503	                DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.35) {
504	                    self.showOnboardingPrompt = false
505	                    self.onboardingPromptText = ""
506	                }
507	            }
508	    
509	
510	            ClickyAnalytics.trackPushToTalkStarted()
511	
512	            pendingKeyboardShortcutStartTask?.cancel()
513	            pendingKeyboardShortcutStartTask = Task {
514	                await buddyDictationManager.startPushToTalkFromKeyboardShortcut(
515	                    currentDraftText: "",
516	                    updateDraftText: { _ in
517	                        // Partial transcripts are hidden (waveform-only UI)
518	                    },
519	                    submitDraftText: { [weak self] finalTranscript in
520	                        self?.lastTranscript = finalTranscript
521	                        print("🗣️ Companion received transcript: \(finalTranscript)")
522	                        ClickyAnalytics.trackUserMessageSent(transcript: finalTranscript)
523	                        self?.sendTranscriptToClaudeWithScreenshot(transcript: finalTranscript)
524	                    }
525	                )
526	            }
527	        case .released:
528	            // Cancel the pending start task in case the user released the shortcut
529	            // before the async startPushToTalk had a chance to begin recording.
530	            // Without this, a quick press-and-release drops the release event and
531	            // leaves the waveform overlay stuck on screen indefinitely.
532	            ClickyAnalytics.trackPushToTalkReleased()
533	            pendingKeyboardShortcutStartTask?.cancel()
534	            pendingKeyboardShortcutStartTask = nil
535	            buddyDictationManager.stopPushToTalkFromKeyboardShortcut()
536	        case .none:
537	            break
538	        }
539	    }

541	    // MARK: - Companion Prompt
542	
543	    private static let companionVoiceResponseSystemPrompt = """
544	    you're clicky, a friendly always-on companion that lives in the user's menu bar. the user just spoke to you via push-to-talk and you can see their screen(s). your reply will be spoken aloud via text-to-speech, so write the way you'd actually talk. this is an ongoing conversation — you remember everything they've said before.
545	
546	    rules:
547	    - default to one or two sentences. be direct and dense. BUT if the user asks you to explain more, go deeper, or elaborate, then go all out — give a thorough, detailed explanation with no length limit.
548	    - all lowercase, casual, warm. no emojis.
549	    - write for the ear, not the eye. short sentences. no lists, bullet points, markdown, or formatting — just natural speech.
550	    - don't use abbreviations or symbols that sound weird read aloud. write "for example" not "e.g.", spell out small numbers.
551	    - if the user's question relates to what's on their screen, reference specific things you see.
552	    - if the screenshot doesn't seem relevant to their question, just answer the question directly.
553	    - you can help with anything — coding, writing, general knowledge, brainstorming.
554	    - never say "simply" or "just".
555	    - don't read out code verbatim. describe what the code does or what needs to change conversationally.
556	    - focus on giving a thorough, useful explanation. don't end with simple yes/no questions like "want me to explain more?" or "should i show you?" — those are dead ends that force the user to just say yes.
557	    - instead, when it fits naturally, end by planting a seed — mention something bigger or more ambitious they could try, a related concept that goes deeper, or a next-level technique that builds on what you just explained. make it something worth coming back for, not a question they'd just nod to. it's okay to not end with anything extra if the answer is complete on its own.
558	    - if you receive multiple screen images, the one labeled "primary focus" is where the cursor is — prioritize that one but reference others if relevant.
559
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:31:46Z)**_

That's the bug — two Clicky.app bundles share **the same CFBundleIdentifier `com.yourcompany.leanring-buddy`**, one nested inside the other, with different signatures (outer: no hardened runtime, nested: hardened runtime). macOS TCC keys on bundle ID and can't reliably decide which one "owns" the permissions. Let me check if the nested Info.plist differs, then clean up.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:31:49Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Compare outer vs nested Clicky Info.plists

`echo "=== OUTER Info.plist (VoiceTranscriptionProvider) ==="; defaults read /Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist VoiceTranscriptionProvider 2>&1; echo "=== NESTED Info.plist (VoiceTranscriptionProvider) ==="; defaults read /Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist VoiceTranscriptionProvider 2>&1; echo "=== Diff ==="; diff /Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist /Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist | head -40`

```text
=== OUTER Info.plist (VoiceTranscriptionProvider) ===
assemblyai
=== NESTED Info.plist (VoiceTranscriptionProvider) ===
apple
=== Diff ===
64c64
< 	<string>assemblyai</string>
---
> 	<string>apple</string>
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:31:59Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:32:02Z)**_

**ROOT CAUSE FOUND.**

- Outer `/Applications/Clicky.app` → `VoiceTranscriptionProvider = assemblyai` (placeholder URL = fails immediately)
- Nested `/Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app` → `VoiceTranscriptionProvider = apple` (correct)

The running process (PID 96630) is the **outer** executable, so it loads `assemblyai`, tries to fetch a placeholder token proxy, fails instantly — that's why recording stops within a second. Every time the "fix" was reinstalled with `cp -R`, it copied the previous `/Applications/Clicky.app` *into* the new one instead of replacing. Russian-doll bundle.

Let me verify the nested bundle is self-contained, then do a clean reinstall:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:32:06Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Verify nested Clicky bundle is self-contained and valid

`ls /Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app/Contents/ ; echo "---"; file /Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app/Contents/MacOS/Clicky ; echo "---"; codesign -v --strict --deep /Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app 2>&1`

```text
Info.plist
MacOS
PkgInfo
Resources
_CodeSignature
---
/Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app/Contents/MacOS/Clicky: Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64
---
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:32:15Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:32:16Z)**_

Nested bundle is clean and self-contained. Executing the rescue:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:32:23Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Kill outer Clicky, extract nested, reinstall clean single bundle

```bash
set -e
echo "=== Step 1: kill running outer Clicky ==="
kill 96630 2>/dev/null || echo "(already stopped)"
sleep 1
pgrep -fl "/Applications/Clicky.app" || echo "(no Clicky running)"

echo "=== Step 2: extract nested bundle to /tmp ==="
rm -rf /tmp/Clicky.app
cp -R /Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app /tmp/Clicky.app

echo "=== Step 3: verify extracted copy ==="
defaults read /tmp/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist VoiceTranscriptionProvider
codesign -v --strict --deep /tmp/Clicky.app && echo "signature OK"

echo "=== Step 4: wipe Russian-doll outer bundle ==="
rm -rf /Applications/Clicky.app

echo "=== Step 5: install clean copy ==="
mv /tmp/Clicky.app /Applications/Clicky.app
ls -la /Applications/Clicky.app/
echo "--- final Info.plist ---"
defaults read /Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist VoiceTranscriptionProvider
defaults read /Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist CFBundleIdentifier
```

```text
com.yourcompany.leanring-buddy
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:33:18Z)**_

Clicky is running (PID 6331) with the clean bundle. Here's a summary of what was actually wrong and why the previous fixes never stuck:

## 根本原因（彻查结果）

**"套娃" bundle** — `/Applications/Clicky.app` 里面又嵌套了一个 `/Applications/Clicky.app/Clicky.app`，两个 bundle 共用同一个 `CFBundleIdentifier` (`com.yourcompany.leanring-buddy`)，但：

| 位置 | VoiceTranscriptionProvider | Hardened Runtime |
|---|---|---|
| 外层（实际被 `open` 启动的可执行文件） | `assemblyai` ← 坏的占位 URL | ❌ |
| 内层（每次被新构建覆盖的那个） | `apple` ← 正确配置 | ✅ |

每次你用 `cp -R Clicky.app /Applications/` 重装时，shell 会把旧的 `/Applications/Clicky.app` 当作目标目录、把新的 `Clicky.app` 复制到里面，于是形成俄罗斯套娃。结果：运行的是外层（坏的），诊断/修复动的是内层（好的）—— 所以每次看起来"改过了"但实际没生效。

Ctrl+Option 按下后：
1. 外层 Clicky 读到 `VoiceTranscriptionProvider=assemblyai`
2. 尝试请求 AssemblyAI token（占位 URL `your-worker-name.your-subdomain...`）
3. DNS/连接立刻失败 → `onError` 触发 → `cancelCurrentDictation` → 录音秒停

## 修复的动作

1. 从外层里把干净的内层 bundle 抽出来到 `/tmp/Clicky.app`
2. 删除整个套娃 `/Applications/Clicky.app`
3. 把干净 bundle 装回 `/Applications/Clicky.app`（现在只有一层，`apple` 配置 + hardened runtime）
4. `tccutil reset` 清掉被污染的 TCC 记录（Microphone/SpeechRecognition/Accessibility/ScreenCapture）
5. `open -F /Applications/Clicky.app` 重新启动，responsibleProc 由 Finder/LaunchServices 接管

## 现在请你做

1. 菜单栏应该出现 Clicky 图标
2. 第一次按 **Ctrl+Option** 时，macOS 会弹三个权限对话框（麦克风、语音识别、辅助功能），全部点**允许**
3. 然后再按住 **Ctrl+Option** 说几个字 → 应该能正常录音、不会秒停

告诉我结果。如果还是有问题，现在只有一个 bundle 了，排查会干净很多。

---

```text
727	    /// If the cursor is in transient mode (user toggled "Show Clicky" off),
728	    /// waits for TTS playback and any pointing animation to finish, then
729	    /// fades out the overlay after a 1-second pause. Cancelled automatically
730	    /// if the user starts another push-to-talk interaction.
731	    private func scheduleTransientHideIfNeeded() {
732	        guard !isClickyCursorEnabled && isOverlayVisible else { return }
733	
734	        transientHideTask?.cancel()
735	        transientHideTask = Task {
736	            // Wait for TTS audio to finish playing
737	            while elevenLabsTTSClient.isPlaying {
738	                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 200_000_000)
739	                guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
740	            }
741	
742	            // Wait for pointing animation to finish (location is cleared
743	            // when the buddy flies back to the cursor)
744	            while detectedElementScreenLocation != nil {
745	                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 200_000_000)
746	                guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
747	            }
748	
749	            // Pause 1s after everything finishes, then fade out
750	            try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 1_000_000_000)
751	            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
752	            overlayWindowManager.fadeOutAndHideOverlay()
753	            isOverlayVisible = false
754	        }
755	    }
```

 `/Users/hong/clicky-src/leanring-buddy/ElevenLabsTTSClient.swift`

```text
1	//
2	//  ElevenLabsTTSClient.swift
3	//  leanring-buddy
4	//
5	//  Streams text-to-speech audio from ElevenLabs and plays it back
6	//  through the system audio output. Uses the streaming endpoint so
7	//  playback begins before the full audio has been generated.
8	//
9	
10	import AVFoundation
11	import Foundation
12	
13	@MainActor
14	final class ElevenLabsTTSClient {
15	    private let proxyURL: URL
16	    private let session: URLSession
17	
18	    /// The audio player for the current TTS playback. Kept alive so the
19	    /// audio finishes playing even if the caller doesn't hold a reference.
20	    private var audioPlayer: AVAudioPlayer?
21	
22	    init(proxyURL: String) {
23	        self.proxyURL = URL(string: proxyURL)!
24	
25	        let configuration = URLSessionConfiguration.default
26	        configuration.timeoutIntervalForRequest = 30
27	        configuration.timeoutIntervalForResource = 60
28	        self.session = URLSession(configuration: configuration)
29	    }
30	
31	    /// Sends `text` to ElevenLabs TTS and plays the resulting audio.
32	    /// Throws on network or decoding errors. Cancellation-safe.
33	    func speakText(_ text: String) async throws {
34	        var request = URLRequest(url: proxyURL)
35	        request.httpMethod = "POST"
36	        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
37	        request.setValue("audio/mpeg", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
38	
39	        let body: [String: Any] = [
40	            "text": text,
41	            "model_id": "eleven_flash_v2_5",
42	            "voice_settings": [
43	                "stability": 0.5,
44	                "similarity_boost": 0.75
45	            ]
46	        ]
47	
48	        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
49	
50	        let (data, response) = try await session.data(for: request)
51	
52	        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
53	            throw NSError(domain: "ElevenLabsTTS", code: -1,
54	                          userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Invalid response"])
55	        }
56	
57	        guard (200...299).contains(httpResponse.statusCode) else {
58	            let errorBody = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) ?? "Unknown error"
59	            throw NSError(domain: "ElevenLabsTTS", code: httpResponse.statusCode,
60	                          userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "TTS API error (\(httpResponse.statusCode)): \(errorBody)"])
61	        }
62	
63	        try Task.checkCancellation()
64	
65	        let player = try AVAudioPlayer(data: data)
66	        self.audioPlayer = player
67	        player.play()
68	        print("🔊 ElevenLabs TTS: playing \(data.count / 1024)KB audio")
69	    }
70	
71	    /// Whether TTS audio is currently playing back.
72	    var isPlaying: Bool {
73	        audioPlayer?.isPlaying ?? false
74	    }
75	
76	    /// Stops any in-progress playback immediately.
77	    func stopPlayback() {
78	        audioPlayer?.stop()
79	        audioPlayer = nil
80	    }
81	}
82
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:40:04Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:40:07Z)**_

Clear now. Flow:
1. Gemini 回复正常（API key 已硬编码在代码里 line 72）
2. 尝试把文字发给 ElevenLabs TTS → 代理 URL `https://your-worker-name.your-subdomain.workers.dev/tts` 是占位符（和 AssemblyAI 那个一样），DNS 都解析不了 → 抛错
3. catch 块播放硬编码的 "I'm all out of credits..."

**修复方案**：把 ElevenLabs 换成 macOS 自带的 `AVSpeechSynthesizer`（免费、离线、不需要代理）。保持 `ElevenLabsTTSClient` 类名和公开接口不变，只换内部实现。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:40:27Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```swift
//
//  ElevenLabsTTSClient.swift
//  leanring-buddy
//
//  Text-to-speech using macOS's built-in AVSpeechSynthesizer.
//  Class name and public API are kept stable for backwards compatibility
//  with existing callers. Uses offline system voices, no network required.
//

import AVFoundation
import Foundation

@MainActor
final class ElevenLabsTTSClient: NSObject {
    /// Present for call-site compatibility. Ignored — system TTS needs no proxy.
    private let proxyURL: URL?
    private let synthesizer = AVSpeechSynthesizer()

    /// Tracks whether the synthesizer is currently producing audio.
    private var isSpeakingFlag = false

    /// Continuation resumed when the current utterance finishes or is cancelled.
    private var speakContinuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Error>?

    init(proxyURL: String) {
        self.proxyURL = URL(string: proxyURL)
        super.init()
        self.synthesizer.delegate = self
    }

    /// Speaks `text` using the system voice. Returns once audio starts playing.
    /// Throws `CancellationError` if `stopPlayback()` is called before completion.
    func speakText(_ text: String) async throws {
        let trimmedText = text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
        guard !trimmedText.isEmpty else { return }

        // Stop anything currently speaking before we start a new utterance.
        if synthesizer.isSpeaking {
            synthesizer.stopSpeaking(at: .immediate)
        }

        try Task.checkCancellation()

        let utterance = AVSpeechUtterance(string: trimmedText)
        utterance.rate = AVSpeechUtteranceDefaultSpeechRate
        utterance.pitchMultiplier = 1.0
        utterance.volume = 1.0
        utterance.voice = Self.preferredVoice(forLanguageOf: trimmedText)

        isSpeakingFlag = true

        // Bridge the delegate callbacks into async/await. We resume as soon
        // as speech actually starts playing, which matches ElevenLabs behavior
        // (caller switches UI to .responding once audio begins).
        try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { (continuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Error>) in
            self.speakContinuation = continuation
            synthesizer.speak(utterance)
        }

        print("🔊 System TTS: speaking \(trimmedText.count) chars")
    }

    /// Whether TTS audio is currently playing back.
    var isPlaying: Bool {
        synthesizer.isSpeaking || isSpeakingFlag
    }

    /// Stops any in-progress playback immediately.
    func stopPlayback() {
        if synthesizer.isSpeaking {
            synthesizer.stopSpeaking(at: .immediate)
        }
        isSpeakingFlag = false
        if let continuation = speakContinuation {
            speakContinuation = nil
            continuation.resume(throwing: CancellationError())
        }
    }

    // MARK: - Voice selection

    /// Picks a reasonable system voice. Uses en-US by default; switches to
    /// zh-CN if the text is predominantly Chinese so Chinese replies sound
    /// correct instead of being read as English phonemes.
    private static func preferredVoice(forLanguageOf text: String) -> AVSpeechSynthesisVoice? {
        let languageCode = detectLanguageCode(for: text)
        if let voice = AVSpeechSynthesisVoice(language: languageCode) {
            return voice
        }
        return AVSpeechSynthesisVoice(language: "en-US")
    }

    private static func detectLanguageCode(for text: String) -> String {
        var chineseCount = 0
        var totalLetterCount = 0
        for scalar in text.unicodeScalars {
            // CJK Unified Ideographs block
            if (0x4E00...0x9FFF).contains(scalar.value) {
                chineseCount += 1
                totalLetterCount += 1
            } else if CharacterSet.letters.contains(scalar) {
                totalLetterCount += 1
            }
        }
        if totalLetterCount > 0 && Double(chineseCount) / Double(totalLetterCount) > 0.3 {
            return "zh-CN"
        }
        return "en-US"
    }
}

// MARK: - AVSpeechSynthesizerDelegate

extension ElevenLabsTTSClient: AVSpeechSynthesizerDelegate {
    nonisolated func speechSynthesizer(
        _ synthesizer: AVSpeechSynthesizer,
        didStart utterance: AVSpeechUtterance
    ) {
        Task { @MainActor in
            guard let continuation = self.speakContinuation else { return }
            self.speakContinuation = nil
            continuation.resume()
        }
    }

    nonisolated func speechSynthesizer(
        _ synthesizer: AVSpeechSynthesizer,
        didFinish utterance: AVSpeechUtterance
    ) {
        Task { @MainActor in
            self.isSpeakingFlag = false
            // If didStart never fired (edge case), resume now to avoid a hang.
            if let continuation = self.speakContinuation {
                self.speakContinuation = nil
                continuation.resume()
            }
        }
    }

    nonisolated func speechSynthesizer(
        _ synthesizer: AVSpeechSynthesizer,
        didCancel utterance: AVSpeechUtterance
    ) {
        Task { @MainActor in
            self.isSpeakingFlag = false
            if let continuation = self.speakContinuation {
                self.speakContinuation = nil
                continuation.resume(throwing: CancellationError())
            }
        }
    }
}
```

Build succeeded. Now install carefully — kill running instance, **delete** the old app completely first (not `cp -R` onto it), then copy the fresh one in, so we don't recreate the Russian-doll:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:41:31Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Clean install fresh build and relaunch

```bash
set -e
echo "=== Kill running Clicky ==="
pkill -f "/Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/MacOS/Clicky" 2>/dev/null || echo "(not running)"
sleep 1

echo "=== Fully remove old /Applications/Clicky.app ==="
rm -rf /Applications/Clicky.app
ls -la /Applications/ | grep -i clicky || echo "(none — good)"

echo "=== Copy fresh build ==="
cp -R /Users/hong/clicky-src/build/Build/Products/Release/Clicky.app /Applications/Clicky.app

echo "=== Verify single bundle, no nesting ==="
find /Applications/Clicky.app -name "Clicky.app" -maxdepth 4
echo "--- Info.plist checks ---"
defaults read /Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist VoiceTranscriptionProvider
defaults read /Applications/Clicky.app/Contents/Info.plist CFBundleIdentifier

echo "=== Launch via open ==="
open -F /Applications/Clicky.app
sleep 2
pgrep -fl "/Applications/Clicky.app" || echo "FAILED"
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-21 17:41:47Z)**_

Clicky 重新启动了（PID 7519），单层 bundle，没有嵌套。

## 做了什么

**问题**：Gemini AI 其实正常响应了，但 Clicky 把回复文字送去 ElevenLabs TTS 那个**占位代理 URL**（`your-worker-name.your-subdomain.workers.dev/tts`），网络请求失败 → 触发 catch 块里的硬编码"I'm all out of credits..."提示。这和之前 AssemblyAI 是同一类坑（作者 Farza 没在源码里填真实代理地址）。

**修复**：重写了 `ElevenLabsTTSClient.swift`，**保持类名和接口不变**（`speakText`/`isPlaying`/`stopPlayback`），内部把 ElevenLabs HTTP 代理换成 macOS 自带的 `AVSpeechSynthesizer`：
- 免费、离线、即装即用
- 自动检测文本是中文还是英文，切换 `zh-CN` / `en-US` 系统语音
- 用 delegate 桥接异步/等待，调用方（`CompanionManager`）完全不需要改

## 现在请你做

按住 **Ctrl+Option** 说一句话 → 应该能听到 macOS 系统语音把 Gemini 的回复念出来（英文声音，因为 Clicky 的 system prompt 还是让它用英文口语回答）。

如果想让 Clicky 改用中文回答 + 中文语音，告诉我，我把 `CompanionManager.swift` 里那个 system prompt 也改成中文。
